title: Affiliates & Social Media Manager
description:
???? About the Role

We’re looking for someone who can grow XMartial through affiliates, content, and social media. This is not a passive role.

 

You’ll be responsible for making affiliates work, managing content output, and driving real growth on Instagram.

 

If you understand combat sports culture and know how to turn attention into revenue, keep reading.

 

???? What You’ll Do



Affiliates (Make It Work)

 2. Turn affiliates into consistent revenue drivers

 3. Identify high-potential creators in the combat sports space



Social Media (Own Growth)

 1. Run and grow XMartial’s Instagram

 2. Post consistently and improve performance

 3. Engage daily with the community (comments, DMs, reposts)



Content Execution

Performance Tracking

???? Compensation

???? What We’re Looking For

 1. Background in BJJ, MMA, or combat sports

 2. Experience with affiliates, influencers, or social growth

 3. Strong understanding of Instagram content that performs

 4. Ability to manage editors and content workflows

 5. Execution-focused mindset

 

? What We’re NOT Looking For

 1. Posting without tracking results

 2. Needing constant direction

 3. No understanding of combat sports culture

 

???? How Success Is Measured

 1. Affiliate revenue

 2. Social media growth and engagement

 3. Content performance

 

???? How to Apply

Apply here: ????

1+ year using CapCut and Photoshop

Experience editing for
/TikTok ad formats

Extreme attention to detail

Creative, artistic mindset

Strong visual storytelling ability

Your portfolio

title: Full-Time Video Editor + Virtual Assistant (VA) (Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
Hey! I run a content marketing business helping real estate agents grow using short-form content (Instagram Reels, TikTok).



I’m looking for a FULL-TIME video editor who can also help with basic VA tasks.



This is a long-term opportunity. I want someone reliable who wants to grow with me and you will receive bonuses for good work.



Bonuses:

$50–$200 for performance (speed, quality, results) (varies)



Must be really good English speaker.



MAIN ROLE:

- Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

- Add captions, cuts, sound effects, and make videos engaging

- Follow a fast-paced, attention-grabbing editing style



OTHER TASKS (I will train you):

- Upload and schedule content

- Help organize content in tools like Google Drive / Miro

- Basic outreach tasks (copy/paste messaging)

- Follow simple SOPs



REQUIREMENTS:

- Must be skilled in video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)

- Must understand fast-paced, engaging content

- Good English communication

- Reliable and fast worker

- Willing to learn and grow



IMPORTANT:

To apply, include the word "INBOUND" at the top of your application.



Also include:

1. 2-3 video editing samples

2. A short Loom video introducing yourself (1-2 minutes)



TIMEZONE VERY IMPORTANT

Ideally I need people who can work from 8:00AM - 3:00PM PHST (Philippines time zone) / 5:00PM - 12:00AM PST (Pacific Standard Time) (My Time)



If you do not follow these instructions, your application will not be considered.



Looking forward to working with you.

title: Head of Podcast & YouTube Growth Strategy
description:
She’s Making Millions is a fast-growing podcast and media brand for ambitious women building 6 - 7 figure businesses. Hosted by international speaker and entrepreneur Taylor Victoria, the show shares real conversations about scaling companies, creating wealth, and stepping into leadership.



Our mission is to help 1 million women build million-dollar businesses.



We are hiring a strategic growth lead who knows how to turn strong podcast content into serious audience growth, with a major focus on YouTube SEO, discoverability, click-through rate, watch-time, and long-term channel performance.



This is a strategy and growth role for someone who deeply understands how YouTube works, how podcast content gets discovered, and how to optimise every episode so it has the best possible chance of ranking, being clicked, being watched, and driving binge behaviour.



Role Overview



You will own the growth of our podcast and YouTube channel.



Your core responsibility is to make sure every episode is positioned to perform.



That includes:

increasing downloads, subscribers, watch-time, retention, and click-through rates

leading YouTube SEO strategy across every episode

crafting high-performing titles and thumbnail briefs

improving visibility through search, suggested content, and browse traffic

analysing performance data and making smart recommendations weekly

working closely with the producer and content team to improve packaging and growth



Key Responsibilities

YouTube SEO and discoverability

Develop and execute a clear YouTube growth strategy with strong SEO foundations

Research keywords, topics, search behaviour, and competitor content to improve discoverability

Optimise every episode for YouTube search, suggested videos, and browse traffic

Write or guide SEO-informed titles that balance discoverability with clickability

Create detailed thumbnail briefs designed to improve CTR

Optimise descriptions, chapters, playlists, metadata, and internal linking

Identify opportunities to improve ranking, visibility, and long-tail traffic over time



Episode packaging and performance

Ensure every episode is packaged for performance before publishing

Strengthen hooks, structure, titles, and thumbnail direction to improve watch-time and retention

Make sure each episode becomes a binge-worthy content asset, not just a one-off upload

Recommend improvements to intros, episode flow, and content positioning based on data



Growth and distribution 

Build and execute a 12-month podcast and YouTube growth strategy

Develop promotional plans for each episode across YouTube, Shorts, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn

Collaborate with guests and the team to increase episode sharing and reach

Help drive more consistent audience growth across both podcast and YouTube platforms



Analytics and reporting

Track performance across YouTube and podcast platforms

Review CTR, watch-time, retention, subscriber growth, traffic sources, and downloads

Run weekly tests and recommend changes based on performance

Report insights, wins, opportunities, and next actions directly to Taylor each week



Success Metrics

You will be measured on:

download growth, target 2x within 6 months

YouTube watch-time and audience retention

click-through rate on titles and thumbnails

subscriber growth month over month

guest share rate, target 80 percent or higher

improved discoverability through search and suggested traffic



Required Skills

Strong experience growing YouTube channels, podcast channels, or both

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO, keyword strategy, search intent, metadata, and discoverability

Ability to write high-converting, SEO-aware titles without sounding robotic or generic

Strong understanding of CTR, retention, watch-time, and how they work together

Able to analyse performance data and turn insights into action

Strong instincts for hooks, audience psychology, and episode packaging

Proactive, strategic, creative, and highly performance-driven

Excellent communication and able to work closely with a producer and content team



Bonus if

You have worked on a creator-led brand or podcast before

You have helped grow a channel through YouTube search and suggested traffic

You understand how to turn long-form episodes into a larger content growth system

You care about women in business, leadership, and wealth-building conversations



Compensation

$500 - $800 AUD per month depending on experience

performance-based bonuses for hitting growth milestones

long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role



To Apply, please send:

1. your CV and portfolio

2. examples of channels, podcasts, or content brands you have helped grow



Why This Role Matters



This role is about more than uploading content.



You will help shape how this brand is found, watched, and remembered.



You will play a key role in helping more women discover the show, trust the brand, and build wealth through the ideas and conversations we share.



If you are strategic, SEO-savvy, obsessed with performance, and know how to grow content on YouTube, we want to hear from you.

title: Web Developer, Blog Writer, & SEO Position For Personal Injury Law Firm
description:
We are seeking a dependable skilled web developer with a strong background in SEO to enhance our website's performance and visibility. 



MUST REVIEW VIDEO TUTORIALS HERE:













* MUST BE DEPENDABLE AND SHOW UP TO ALL SCHEDULED INTERVIEWS & MEETINGS

The ideal candidate will be dependable and will show up on time to scheduled interview and meetings. 



The ideal candidate will be responsible for building responsive web pages and implementing SEO best practices to improve search engine rankings. Candidates should be familiar with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and SEO tools. If you have a passion for creating user-friendly websites and optimizing them for search engines, we would love to hear from you.



Website Developer: WordPress, Page Creation & Blogging, SEO, Google Optimization & Website Performance Enhancement



Job Description:



Seeking a skilled web developer with expertise in WordPress, blogging, SEO, and Google tools optimization. This role focuses on optimizing website performance, enhancing search engine visibility, and improving user experience. Ideal candidates should have experience with technical SEO, Google Analytics GA4 integration, Google My Business management, and content creation.



Responsibilities:



Website Optimization:

Enhance website structure, navigation, and responsiveness on WordPress.

Improve font sizes, graphics, and visuals for better readability and engagement.

Build and optimize webpages for all firm practice areas.



Mobile Performance:

Optimize for mobile performance and ensure compliance with Google Core Web Vitals.

Implement strategies to improve mobile rankings and user experience.



SEO and Keyword Strategy:

Optimize the site for commercial and transactional keywords to rank in the top 20 search engine results.

Build high-quality backlinks and enhance technical SEO.

Strengthen content with clear calls to action (CTAs) to increase engagement.



Google Tools Integration:

Improve website indexing and visibility using Google Search Console.

Install and configure Google Analytics GA4, including tracking codes, data streams, and reporting.

Analyze GA4 data to provide actionable insights for performance improvement.



Google My Business (GMB) Management:

Optimize and manage the firm’s Google My Business profile to increase local search visibility.

Ensure accuracy, use GMB features effectively, and maintain regular updates.



Content and Blogging:

Create SEO-optimized blog posts to drive organic traffic and increase domain authority.

Implement keyword strategies and align content with the firm’s goals.



Requirements:



Proven experience in WordPress development, SEO, and technical website optimization.

Expertise in Google tools, including Analytics (GA4), Search Console, and Google My Business.

Strong knowledge of blogging, content marketing, and backlink building.

Familiarity with Core Web Vitals, mobile-first optimization, and local SEO strategies.

Strong communication skills, detail-oriented, and results-driven approach.



MUST HAVE GOOD INTERNET CONNECTION



Minimum internet connection requirements include 150 Mbps Wifi which is good for activities such as streaming videos and video conferencing, downloading media files, and working remotely. 



Test internet speed here:



https://www.speedtest.net/

title: Full-Time Professional Video Editor (eCommerce & Retail)
description:
About Us



We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and Retail brand looking for a highly skilled Video Editor Professional to join our creative team full-time. We move fast, innovate daily, and are looking for a driven creative who wants to grow with a brand that is scaling quickly.



The Role



As our full-time Video Editor, you will be the driving force behind our visual content. You will be responsible for creating high-converting video ads, engaging social media content, and polished product showcases.



Critical Requirement: We rely heavily on bringing our high-quality product photography to life. A crucial part of this role requires the ability to take static images and creatively transform them into dynamic, engaging videos by animating, panning, and simulating different camera angles (parallax effects, 3D camera movements) from still images.



Key Responsibilities



Image-to-Video Animation: Masterfully create dynamic, high-converting video content using 2D/3D animation techniques, simulated camera angles, and motion graphics extracted purely from static product images.

Edit and produce scalable video content tailored for eCommerce platforms and social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, and YouTube).

Create multiple hooks and variations of video ads for A/B testing.

Apply seamless transitions, color grading, sound design, trending audio, and text overlays/captions to maximize viewer retention.

Collaborate daily with our creative team to brainstorm, storyboard, and execute campaigns from concept to final render.

Qualifications & Requirements

Proven experience as a Video Editor, preferably with experience creating content for eCommerce or retail brands.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement: You must provide examples of videos you have created primarily using still images with dynamic angles and simulated camera movements.

Advanced proficiency in industry-standard software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).

Deep understanding of social media algorithms, pacing, and what drives e-commerce conversions.

Ability to work full-time, handle multiple projects at once, and deliver assets on tight deadlines.



How to Apply

If you have a keen eye for eCommerce trends and are incredibly talented at breathing dynamic life into still images, we want you on our team!



Please apply by sending the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with eCommerce video editing.

Your portfolio or demo reel (Please explicitly point out or link to a specific example where you created a video using different angles of images).

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word "Scale" in the first line of your application so we know you read this entire post.

Let me know if you would like me to add any specific software requirements (like specifically asking for After Effects) or if you want to emphasize any particular social media platforms!

title: Experienced Associate Brand Manager to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: GHL EXPERT
description:
**Job Title:** GoHighLevel Specialist (Part-Time, Ongoing, $400-$500/mo, Start ASAP)



**Job Description:**



Health and wellness practice needs a GoHighLevel specialist to build and maintain funnels, a full website, landing pages, and
 automations. This is ongoing work, not a one-time project.



Hours: 10 -12 hours/week with option to increase.



First projects: Build sales pages, thank you pages, and order pages for two funnels (a digital course and a lab test funnel). Set up full
 sequences with conditional automations for both. Later, build a complete website inside GHL.



Ongoing: New funnels, page updates,
 edits, workflow troubleshooting, and website maintenance. Future projects will likely include setting up and managing a community forum inside GHL, lead tracking, and text automations. 



We have templates for all of the pages, and content will be provided.



YOU MUST HAVE:



1. 12+ months building funnels and websites for clients inside GoHighLevel (not WordPress, ClickFunnels, Kajabi, or Kartra).

2. Hands-on experience with GHL workflows: triggers, wait steps, if/else branches, tags, and pipelines.

3. Experience building full websites (not just single landing pages) inside GHL.

4. Portfolio of GHL pages and/or websites you built (live links or screenshots).

5. Ability to start within 5 business days.



Bonus: Experience with GHL's community/membership features is a strong plus.



TO APPLY: ANSWER THESE 3 QUESTIONS

(Applications that skip any question will not be reviewed.)



1. Show your work. Send 2 to 3 live links or screenshots of GHL funnel pages or websites you built. For bonus points, include a short Loom video walking me through one build.



2. Show a workflow. Attach a screenshot from inside GHL's workflow builder showing a real automation you created. Tell me in 2 sentences what it does.



3. Solve this scenario. A customer purchases a course. They get a welcome
 immediately, then login instructions 24 hours later. If they have not logged in after 72 hours, they get a reminder. If they have logged in, no reminder is sent. Walk me through exactly how you build this in GHL: which triggers, which workflow steps, which conditions.



NOTE: If your experience is mainly on other platforms and you plan to learn GHL on this job, this is not the right fit. I am looking for someone who already works in GoHighLevel daily.

description:
INTRO

This is an opportunity for someone who knows their way around CRM systems and automation—and wants to do more than just follow instructions.

ABOUT YOU

 and SMS campaigns

 ads, forms, automation workflows)

Performance-based bonuses

Clear pathway to become a VA Team Leader as we expand

Generous salary



ABOUT US



We’re a growing physio clinic focused on building a business that runs on systems, not chaos.



We’re at the stage where demand is strong, and now we’re doubling down on marketing, automation, and building a proper team behind the scenes.



That means:



Better systems

More consistent patient flow



We don’t do guesswork. We care about what works.



If you like clean systems, clear numbers, and being part of something that’s scaling—this will suit you.



HOW TO APPLY

title: YouTube Video Editor – Finance & Crypto Education Channel (Long-Form)
description:
We're hiring a skilled long-form YouTube video editor for growing Finance & Crypto channels. You will receive raw footage (interview clips + AI avatar narration) and are expected to turn it into a high-retention, engaging YouTube video with relevant B-roll, clean pacing, and polished delivery.



What You'll Do:



- Edit long-form YouTube videos in the Finance and Crypto niches (typically 10-15 minutes)

- Work with raw footage including interview clips and AI avatar narration segments

- Add relevant B-roll (news clips, photos, news article screenshots, footage, supporting graphics etc.)

- Add basic motion elements when needed (zoom/crop, simple titles, emphasis text)

- Clean up pacing, ensure smooth transitions between interview clips and narration

- Ensure high-quality audio levels and overall polish



Required Skills:



- High-level English

- Fast communication

- Proven experience editing long-form YouTube videos

- Ability to independently choose and place relevant B-roll to support narration

- Experience in CapCut Pro (preferred) or Adobe Premiere Pro



We want you to match the editing style of the following channels:



- Crypto Nutshell: 

- Library of Wealth: 

- Jamie Tree: 



If you do not think you can edit in the style of the above channels, please do not apply.



Pay + Work Volume:



- $40 USD per video delivered + bonuses for performance

- We want to aim for you to produce 15 videos per month ($40 * 15 = $600 per month) with potential to grow

- Expected turnaround time: 48 hours per video



Trial Edit (Required)



To apply, you will be given a short editing trial using sample footage. (less than 1 minute)



If your edit matches the style and quality we want, we will offer you the opportunity to work on a full video where you will receive full payment.



How to Apply (Important)



Start your application with the word: cookie. This is to confirm you have fully read the job post.



Please include all relevant experience you have in your application.



We are looking for a long-term editor we can rely on. If you're detail-oriented and can make Finance and Crypto content super engaging and educational, there will be consistent work.

description:

title: #### Real Estate Dispositions Manager | US Market | Immediate Start | Remote ####
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and communication-driven professional to join our real estate investment company in a hybrid role that combines Transaction Coordination and Dispositions Management.



This role is ideal for someone who understands the full lifecycle of a real estate wholesale deal—from contract to close—and can excel at both managing transactions and selling deals to qualified buyers.



Core Responsibilities



Transaction Coordination Duties

==============================

Make the introduction call to clients and establish communication from contract to close.

Coordinate with title companies, ensuring all requirements are met and deals close on time.

Schedule and manage property access, showings, inspections, and visits.

Set clear expectations with sellers, explaining timelines, next steps, and required documents.

Communicate with buyers to ensure they submit their EMD (Earnest Money Deposit) on time.

Track deadlines, title status, and closing milestones to prevent delays.

Knowledge of CRMs such as GoHighLevel/Podio is a strong advantage.

Experience handling complex transactions such as probates, foreclosures, sub-to, liens, and title issues.



Dispositions Duties

==============================

Publish new deals on relevant marketing platforms (InvestorLift,
 groups,
 blasts, etc.).

Contact prospective buyers, present the deal, and negotiate interest.

Secure signed assignment agreements and guide buyers through the process.

Add interested and qualified buyers to the company’s CRM, tagging and organizing them appropriately.

Build and maintain strong relationships with buyers to increase repeat sales.



Qualifications

==============================

Experience in real estate wholesaling, especially in transactions or dispositions.

Strong communication and customer-service skills.

Organized, efficient, and able to manage multiple deals simultaneously.

Ability to problem-solve title issues and keep deals on track.

Comfortable on the phone and confident speaking with buyers and sellers.

CRM experience (GoHighLevel/Podio preferred-We are moving from Podio to GHL).



What We’re Looking For

==============================

Someone proactive who takes full ownership of their deals.

Someone who can keep deals moving smoothly while also driving sales on the dispo side.

A high-energy team player who thrives in a fast-paced real estate environment.



** Big plus **

> Podio (workspaces, apps, tasks, basic automations-We are moving to GHL in a couple of weeks).

> Real estate wholesaling/investment experience (ARV, repair estimates, dispositions).



How to apply

=========================

> Via OnlineJobs,
, or Teams with:

>> “I’m a Disposition Wizard” at the top

> Link to CV

> Brief voice sample (60–90s intro or past call snippet)

> Your availability, time zone, and monthly salary (USD)

> Tools you’ve used for comps and CRM

> This role is modeled on our acquisitions workflow and deal analysis standards.

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOUR ENGLISH IS NOT EXCELLENT. MUST HAVE NEAR PERFECT GRAMMAR, SPELLING, PUNCTUATION. 



Searching for a part-time video editor. Someone creative who has the skills to turn regular videos into viral-worthy content. 



Volume: this changes slightly, but for about 3 different people and 5-8 videos each. 

Software: do you have a video editing software?



What I am looking for: 

1.) Overall quality of the video, meaning how good it looks and how interesting it is. The ideas for the video are that they should ideally be going viral, getting thousands of views, or generating leads. Some videos may be used in Meta ads, so they have to be really good. 



2). Accuracy and attention to detail: in this sample, and if we work together in the future, I need there to be nearly 0 mistakes on the videos, specifically grammar and punctuation-wise. I understand that English is not an easy language, and it is not your first language, but please rely on AI to make sure that the grammar and punctuation are correct. Unsure of the grammar? Ask ChatGPT or whatever AI you use. Unsure if a proper noun needs to be capitalized? Run it by AI. Please watch the video 3 times before uploading it to check for any mistakes (can watch in 1.5 or 1.75 speed) 



3). Timing: once the videos for the client are uploaded, I ideally need them back in 1-2 days. The videos are mostly uploaded on different days (so like Mondays, Tuesdays, and Wednesdays).

strong at storytelling and emotional pacing

collaborative, communicative, and open to feedback

proud of their work and always looking to improve

able to consistently deliver within 1–1.5 weeks per wedding

Our work culture



Our team is fast-moving but calm, with a strong focus on collaboration and feedback.

Pay will be discussed during the interview based on experience.

How to Apply:



Please send our messages:

Your portfolio or relevant wedding samples.

A 1MIN VIDEO INTRODUCTION about your experience and why you think you'd be a good fit.

Your location and time zone.

ALSO WRITE PURPLE VIDEO EDITOR IN YOUR ENQUIRY



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

If you do not have prior wedding video editing experience, please do not apply.

title: Paid Media Specialist — Meta & Google Ads
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE 

Amplifly Studio is a boutique AI-powered brand amplification studio based in New Zealand. We run marketing for a focused portfolio of clients — a premium ecommerce honey brand and a residential property developer — and we're looking for a Paid Media Specialist to own and operate their paid campaigns.



This is a hands-on execution role. You'll be building, managing, and optimising Meta and Google campaigns across two very different client types: ecommerce (ROAS-focused) and property lead gen. You'll work directly with the studio founder and plug into an existing system built on Airtable, Notion, and Claude AI to keep everything streamlined and documented.



If you're strong on performance, organised, and can operate independently inside a clear system — this role is for you.



What you'll be doing

Building and managing Meta Ads campaigns across two client accounts — ecommerce and lead generation

Building and managing Google Ads campaigns — Shopping, Search, and Display as required

Weekly campaign monitoring, optimisation, and reporting — documented in Airtable

Writing ad copy briefed from client brand guidelines and approved copy frameworks

Coordinating creative requests with the design team — providing clear, structured creative briefs

A/B testing copy, creative, audiences, and landing pages — with documented results

Pulling monthly performance reports (Meta Ads Manager + GA4) and summarising in plain English

Setting up and maintaining pixel tracking, conversion events, and audience segments

Managing ad spend budgets and flagging pacing issues proactively



who we are looking for 

Must-haves

Meta Ads — strong

Google Ads — strong

ROAS & CPA optimisation

Google Shopping campaigns

Conversion tracking setup

GA4 proficiency

A/B testing

Clear written English

Organised and self-managing

3+ years running paid media campaigns — not just boosted posts

Demonstrable results: ecommerce ROAS or lead gen CPL you can speak to

Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

Comfortable working inside systems — you document, you follow process, you flag issues early

Responsive and reliable communicator — async-first via Notion and Airtable



Strong bonus

Photoroom

Creatify

Arcads

Pencil

Creatomate

Klaviyo

HubSpot CRM


 / automation

Property / real estate campaigns

Shopify ecommerce

If you can use AI creative platforms to batch-produce ad creative from brand guidelines and copy — Photoroom, Creatify, Arcads, Pencil, Creatomate — this is a significant advantage and will shape how quickly you grow within the role.



How we work

All briefs, jobs, and approvals live in Airtable and Notion — you'll have a contractor login

Communication is async-first via Notion and WhatsApp — no unnecessary meetings

You report into Narissa Taylor (studio founder) — direct line, clear feedback

We use Claude AI to support copy, creative briefs, and reporting frameworks — comfort with AI tools is a genuine plus

Each client has documented brand rules — we build systems so you're never guessing

Compensation

Starting rate

USD $5–$7/hr

Experienced / proven results

USD $7–$9/hr

Hours (initial)

10–20 hrs/week

Growth potential

Full-time as portfolio expands

Payment

To apply

Send your application with the subject line Paid Media — [Your Name].



Please include:



A short intro — who you are, what platforms you specialise in

2–3 campaign results you're proud of (platform, objective, result — e.g. "Google Shopping, ROAS 4.2x over 3 months")

Your current availability and weekly hours

Your rate expectation in USD/hr

Any AI creative tools you've used — even briefly, tell us what you've tried

Applications without campaign results will not be considered. We read every application — no cover letter required.

title: Experienced, Xero-Proficient Management Accountant (Month-End Close Only)
description:
Job Description

Company: Priority Haulage Limited

Job Title: Management Accountant

Job Type: Remote / Part-Time

Reports to: Financial Controller

Start Date: May 2026



About Priority Haulage

Priority Haulage is a reputable and reliable heavy machinery and equipment transport business based in Auckland, New Zealand. We specialise in the safe and efficient transportation of a wide range of civil machinery and heavy access equipment. 



Our company motto, “Your Assets, Our Priority”, reflects our commitment to the secure and dependable movement of our clients’ valuable machinery. We take pride in delivering a high level of client satisfaction through trusted service and operational excellence.



Job Summary

Priority Haulage is seeking a capable and detail-oriented Management Accountant (Part-Time) to support the delivery of accurate and timely month-end financial reporting.



Working closely with the Financial Operations Manager and reporting to the Financial Controller, this role is responsible for maintaining financial integrity across core accounting processes, ensuring reliable data to support operational decision-making within a fast-paced, growing transport business.



This position is suited to someone highly proficient in Xero, comfortable working independently, and experienced in structured month-end close environments.



Job Responsibilities Overview

This is a hands-on, execution-focused role centred on the monthly financial close. The primary responsibility is to ensure all financial data is processed, reconciled, and reported accurately and on time each month.



The role requires availability for 1–2 days prior to month-end for close preparation, and approximately 8 working days post month-end to complete the close cycle. This is expected to equate to approximately 15–25 hours per month during this period, with specific scheduling aligned to month-end requirements and agreed with the successful candidate. 



The role requires strong technical accounting capability, attention to detail, and a disciplined approach. Performance is measured by the accuracy and timeliness of reporting, adherence to internal processes, and the ability to consistently deliver high-quality outputs with minimal supervision.



Over time, there may be opportunities to contribute to financial analysis, system/process improvements, and data alignment initiatives, based on capability and demonstrated performance.



Job Responsibilities

•	Prepare and analyse monthly management accounts using Xero and CCH Workpapers, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timeliness. 

•	Perform key account reconciliations and resolve discrepancies prior to month-end close.

•	Ensure all financial activities comply with New Zealand accounting standards and tax requirements.

•	Maintain accurate financial records, filing systems, and data integrity in line with company standards 

•	Contribute to continuous improvement of financial processes, with a focus on efficiency and consistency.



Required Experience & Capability

Applicants should demonstrate proven experience operating in a structured, deadline-driven finance environment.



•	Minimum 7+ years’ hands-on accounting experience.

•	CPA qualification required, preferably a Regular Member of PICPA, with a recognised tertiary qualification in accounting.

•	Proven experience preparing monthly management accounts, conducting financial analysis, and supporting budgeting and forecasting processes.

•	Advanced proficiency in Xero is essential.

•	Strong Microsoft Excel capability, with proven ability to reconcile and analyse data using XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, pivot tables, and financial modelling functions.

•	Working knowledge of New Zealand tax regulations, accounting standards, and statutory compliance requirements.

•	Demonstrated ability to operate independently in a remote environment, with strong self-management, reliability, and a consistent track record of meeting deadlines without oversight.

•	Strong ability to collaborate cross-functionally, supporting finance-related workflows across the business.

•	High level of technical proficiency, including the Microsoft platform, with working familiarity in modern business tools such as:

o	Notion

o	ChatGPT



Preferred Experience 

•	Experience within New Zealand or Australian Chartered Accounting firms, including use of CCH Workpapers.

•	Exposure to a commercial business environment, ideally within transport, logistics, or fleet-based operations.



Personal Attributes

•	Highly organised and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities reliably.

•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills, able to operate autonomously while contributing effectively in a remote team environment.

•	Analytical and problem-solving capability, particularly in identifying, investigating, and resolving financial discrepancies.

•	Proactive and improvement-oriented, with the ability to adapt, optimise workflows, and navigate operational change.

•	Professional, client-focused mindset, demonstrating integrity, quality standards, and accountability in delivery.



Required Equipment and Setup

•	Dedicated Workspace: Quiet, distraction-free home office suitable for video calls and focused work.

•	Computer Requirements (Desktop PC or Laptop):

o	Processor: Intel Core i5 or better.

o	RAM: Minimum 8GB (16GB preferred).

o	Operating System: Windows 10/11, compatible with required business software.

o	Internet: Stable high-speed connection (minimum 10 Mbps download/upload).

•	Monitor Setup: Dual monitors preferred, or a laptop paired with an external monitor.

•	Headset: Noise-cancelling for clear communication during virtual meetings.

•	Webcam: High-quality external or integrated camera for video calls.

•	Power Backup: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or generator ensuring at least 3 hours of operational uptime during outages.

•	Internet Backup: Secondary internet connection (e.g., mobile data or alternative wireless) for uninterrupted connectivity.



Application Requirement

In your application submission, include the word “Motivated!” in the title.

title: Private Equity Investment Analyst
description:
About the Company

Bexley Capital is a U.S.-based one of the fastest growing private investment firms specializing in real estate and infrastructure private equity transactions. We are a lean, remote-friendly team that manages a growing portfolio of commercial properties and investment assets across the United States. Our work spans deal sourcing, financial analysis, underwriting, transaction financing, investor reporting, and ongoing asset management.



We value clear communication, attention to detail, and professionals who take ownership of their work. We have a strong track record of working with long-term Filipino virtual tea
mbers and provide a stable, professional environment with clear expectations and consistent pay.



Role Overview

We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Investment Analyst VA to support our deal evaluation, financial modeling, and investor communication work. You will work directly with our senior investment team on real, live transactions — not busy work.



This is a great opportunity for someone with a finance or accounting background who wants meaningful exposure to U.S. private equity and real estate investing.



What You Will Be Doing

FINANCIAL MODELING & ANALYSIS

• Build, update, and audit Excel/Google Sheets financial models for property acquisitions, developments, and dispositions

• Run sensitivity analyses and scenario tests to support investment decisions

• Research market comparables, rent data, cap rates, and other real estate metrics



DEAL & TRANSACTION SUPPORT

1) Assist in preparing investment committee memos, presentation decks, and supporting data packages

2) Build financial models and analyze IRR and cash yield metrics

3) Organize and review due diligence materials (financial statements, rent rolls, legal documents)

4) Maintain deal pipeline trackers and manage document folders



INVESTOR & REPORTING SUPPORT

• Draft investor update memos, quarterly reports, and data summaries

• Prepare and format PowerPoint and PDF presentations for investors and partners

• Assist with ad hoc research and portfolio monitoring tasks



What We Are Looking For

• At least 2 years of experience in financial analysis, investment research, equity research, accounting, or a related field

• Strong Excel skills — you should be comfortable building models from scratch, not just editing them

• Proficiency in PowerPoint or Google Slides for professional presentation preparation

• Experience with U.S. real estate, investment banking, or private equity

• Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business, or related field is a plus

• Strong written English — you will be drafting investor-facing documents

• Self-starter who can manage tasks independently across different time zones

• Reliable internet connection and a dedicated home office setup

Nice to Have

• CPA, CFA candidate, or relevant postgraduate finance qualifications

• Prior experience working with U.S.-based clients or employers

• Familiarity with U.S. real estate terminology (cap rates, NOI, LTV, IRR, DSCR, etc.)

Compensation & Working Conditions

• Salary: $2,400-$3400 USD per month (paid bi-weekly or monthly via Wise/Payoneer)

• Full-time, long-term position — we are not looking for project-based or part-time candidates

• Working hours aligned to U.S. Central or Eastern time (overlap required during core business hours)

• 13th month equivalent bonus for long-tenured tea
mbers

• Performance review at 6 months with salary growth potential

How to Apply

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph. In your application message, include:



1. A brief summary of your finance or investment experience

2. A specific example of a financial model or analysis you have built

3. Your availability and current time zone



Applications without a personalized message will not be considered. We respond to all qualified applicants within 3–5 business days.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist (CRM Systems | SaaS + Real Estate | Growth-Focused Team)
description:
Overview:



We’re building a high-level SaaS platform in the real estate space and are looking for a GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist to support and scale our internal systems.



This is a systems-focused role, not a general Virtual Assistant position.



You will work directly with the CEO and Head Developer to ensure our CRM infrastructure is running smoothly across multiple sub-accounts, while also supporting onboarding and training for new clients.



We’re looking for someone who can own systems, think critically, and help us improve how everything operates, not just follow instructions.



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Manage and maintain multiple GoHighLevel sub-accounts

 • Ensure workflows, automations, pipelines, and integrations are functioning properly

 • Troubleshoot issues across accounts and resolve them efficiently

 • Support and occasionally lead client onboarding calls

 • Assist with and eventually lead GHL training sessions for clients

 • Collaborate closely with the Head Developer on system improvements and implementations

 • Monitor system performance and ensure consistency across all accounts

 • Follow and improve existing SOPs, workflows, and internal systems

 • Identify opportunities to optimize processes and increase efficiency





Who We’re Looking For

 • Strong experience with GoHighLevel (required)

 • Comfortable managing multiple accounts and systems simultaneously

 • Technical and quick to learn new tools or integrations

 • Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

 • Confident leading calls and explaining systems to clients

 • Highly organized with strong attention to detail

 • Proactive and solution-oriented

 • Able to troubleshoot independently and think critically





Work Environment

 • You’ll work directly with leadership (CEO + Head Developer)

 • Fast-paced, systems-driven environment

 • Clear structure, SOPs, and workflows already in place

 • Hands-on training and ongoing support provided

 • You’ll be set up with the tools and guidance needed to succeed





What Success Looks Like

 • All GHL sub-accounts are operating smoothly and consistently

 • Automations, pipelines, and integrations run without issues

 • Onboarding and training sessions are clear, professional, and effective

 • You proactively identify and solve problems before they escalate

 • You become a reliable systems operator within the team



?



Compensation & Growth Structure

 • Full-Time (40 hours/week)

 • Base Salary: $1,500 – $2,500/month (based on experience with GoHighLevel)



Performance-Based Growth

 • Compensation increases tied to:

 • Number of sub-accounts successfully managed

 • Ability to lead onboarding and training independently

 • System performance and issue resolution speed

 • Clear path to $3,000+/month as you take on more ownership



Fast Track Opportunity

 • High performers may be eligible for an accelerated compensation review within 30–60 days



How to Apply



To be considered, please submit:

 • Your resume

 • A brief summary of your experience with GoHighLevel

 • A short Loom introducing yourself

 • (Preferred) A walkthrough of a GHL account, workflow, or system you’ve built or managed



Hiring Process

 • Initial application review

 • Short call with our team

 • Practical test project (GHL-focused)

 • Final interview with leadership

 • Offer and onboarding



?



Final Note



We are not hiring a task-based VA.



We are hiring someone who can become a core systems operator inside our company.



You will not be left to figure things out alone.

You will have direct access to leadership, structured training, and ongoing support to ensure you succeed.



If you’re systems-minded, confident in GoHighLevel, and ready to take ownership, we’d love to hear from you.

, and YouTube Shorts

What We Offer

How to Apply

title: Data Verification Specialist
description:
Part-time, 20 hours per week, work your own hours.



We're seeking a highly accurate and fast-paced AI Quality Assurance Specialist for a part-time remote role (20 hours per week). This position involves reviewing AI-generated transcriptions of historical handwritten documents and correcting errors. The workflow requires maintaining a target output of verifying 800 names per hour using a streamlined, keyboard-driven interface.



Compensation:

$350 USD (includes $100 performance bonus) - 20 hours per week 



About Us:

We are a remote-first technology startup building the largest verified digital archive of Mediterranean genealogical records. By combining proprietary Artificial Intelligence with human verification, we solve the transcription errors that currently plague legacy family history platforms. Our database maps millions of historical births, marriages, and household census records from the 1500s to the 1900s, providing a definitive, 100?curate index for a global diaspora.



Culture:

As a start-up, there's always lots to learn. It's not a top-down culture, we reward performance and focus on what's been achieved, not what's been missed.



The Role:

As a AI Quality Specialist, you provide the final quality control check before records are published to a live database.

1. Core Task: Visually cross-reference scanned images of 18th and 19th-century handwritten documents against text generated by our AI.

2. Correction: Quickly approve accurate matches and manually correct the 5% to 10% of names where the AI hallucinates or misinterprets the handwriting.

3. Speed & Efficiency: Maintain a baseline verification speed of 800 names per hour utilizing custom keyboard shortcuts to eliminate mouse dependency.

4. Linguistic Context: The records feature Mediterranean naming conventions (closely resembling Spanish, Italian, and Latin roots). You must adapt quickly to specific character combinations and cursive handwriting styles.



Requirements

- Demonstrated experience in high-volume data entry, transcription, or quality assurance.

- Exceptional visual attention to detail and the ability to sustain focus over long processing sessions.

- High proficiency in reading cursive handwriting and identifying phonetic spelling patterns.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a workstation optimized for fast, repetitive keyboard input.

- Be able to work the same 4 hour blocks in Week One for training.



Who this role is good for:

- You thrive in "flow state" environments and prefer highly repetitive, singular workflows over constantly shifting daily responsibilities.

- You have a proven background in medical transcription, legal data entry, or similar roles that demand sustained focus and accuracy over a full shift.

- You instinctively use keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys. You view using a computer mouse as a bottleneck to your processing speed.

- You don't get stuck on puzzles. If an 18th-century word is completely illegible, you are comfortable flagging it within 5 seconds and immediately moving to the next record.



BONUS: You have previously worked transcribing historical handwriting, have experience working with Latin or Italian text, or have worked in a role where you transcribed "doctor's handwriting" .



**********

To Apply:



Please spend 5 minutes filling out this form:

title: Video Editor for Cycling Coaching Brand (YouTube + Reels/Shorts), Long-Term)
description:
About The Company

We are Capacity Coaching LLC, an online cycling coaching brand led by a former professional road cyclist and head coach of a university cycling club in Los Angeles. 



Our team uses social media content to market our services, so we produce a large amount of educational content for cyclists and athletes. However editing has become a bottleneck for our growth. The company is looking for a long term video editor to handle all editing so the coach can focus more of his time on coaching and recording.



Position: Part Time Video Editor (Long Form + Short Form)

The editor will NOT need to:

- Come up with topics

- Write scripts

- Be on camera



The editor will:

- Take recorded videos and scripts and:

- Edit 1 long form video per week (YouTube style)

- Edit 6–7 short form clips per week from existing footage (Reels/Shorts/TikTok)



This is intended as a long term, stable role for the right person.



Responsibilities

Weekly:

Long form editing (1x/week)

- Edit 1 video (8–20 minutes) for YouTube

- Provide clean cuts, pacing, basic sound/colour correction

- Add light B roll/zoom/crop moves where it makes sense

- Export in YT ready format and organize files clearly

Short form editing (6–7x/week)

- Create 6–7 vertical clips (20–60 seconds) or carousels from provided footage (2-3 will come from the YouTube video)

- Add clean subtitles/captions

- Add simple on screen hook text (based on provided script/headline)

- Export in IG Reels / YT Shorts ready format and name files clearly



Monthly output:

1. 4 long form videos

2. ~24–28 short form clips



All raw footage, scripts/outlines, creative direction, and reference examples will be provided.



Requirements

1. Strong video editing skills in CapCut, Adobe Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci Resolve (any is fine)

2. Proven experience editing:

- Talking head / educational style videos

- Reels/Shorts/TikToks with subtitles and hooks



3. Good written English (for on screen text and understanding scripts)

4. Reliable internet and ability to work with large video files (Google Drive/Dropbox)

5. Ability to follow directions and meet deadlines consistently

6. Open to feedback and iterative improvement



Bonus (not required, but a plus):

- Interest in cycling or endurance sports

- Experience editing for YouTube creators, coaches, or educators



Work Hours & Time Zone

- Flexible, part time (~20 hours per week)

- Can work own hours as long as: Deadlines are met, there is some overlap for a short weekly check in (PH daytime / US morning)



Salary / Compensation

- Starting salary: USD $800–$1,200/month

- Exact amount depends on experience and portfolio quality



First month is a paid trial. If both sides are happy, the role continues on an ongoing basis.



How To Apply (MANDATORY PORTFOLIO REQUIRED)

To be considered, applicants must apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

1. A short introduction (3–5 sentences) about editing experience

2. Links to:

- 2–3 long form videos edited previously (YouTube or similar)

- 5–10 short form clips (Reels/Shorts/TikToks) edited previously, ideally talking head/educational style

- The video editing software currently used

- Expected monthly salary for the scope described

- Typical working hours in PH time



Applications without portfolio links (examples of recent work) will not be considered.



Thank you!

title: Experienced GHL Specialist – Build Scalable Systems & Automations
description:
Milkyway Is Hiring



Are you the systems-driven GHL Specialist we’re looking for?



Are you highly organised, technically confident in GoHighLevel, and obsessed with building systems that actually work—not just look good on the surface?



Do you enjoy designing clean automations, optimising customer journeys, and turning messy processes into scalable systems?

If you’re someone who can combine structured thinking, technical execution, and smart use of AI to improve performance—not just speed—this could be the role for you.



About Milkyway

Milkyway is a digital agency helping businesses grow through strategy, branding, websites, content, and performance marketing.

Behind every high-performing campaign is a well-built system—and that’s where you come in.

We’re growing quickly and are now looking for a dedicated GHL (GoHighLevel) Specialist to join our team.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal person takes ownership of systems, thinks beyond tasks, and builds automation that supports real business outcomes—not just technical completion.



You are:

• Highly experienced with GoHighLevel (GHL). (Do not apply if you are a beginner.)  

• Confident building workflows, automations, funnels, campaigns, and dashboards end-to-end.  

• Strong in mapping and improving customer journeys across marketing and sales pipelines.  

• Exceptionally organised and detail-oriented.  

• Comfortable troubleshooting system, automation, and data issues independently.  

• Process-driven with strong logical thinking.  

• Proactive in identifying inefficiencies and improving systems before issues arise.  

• Calm under pressure and solutions-focused.  

• A clear communicator who can explain systems in simple, practical terms.  

• Accountable, reliable, and consistent in execution.  

• A fast learner who stays up to date with GHL updates and best practices.  

• At least 2 years of experience working in an agency environment.



AI + SYSTEMS CAPABILITY

We’re looking for someone who understands both traditional system building and modern AI-powered workflows.

You should:

• Be able to design and build systems without relying on AI.  

• Know how to use AI tools inside and outside GHL to enhance workflows, speed, and insights.  

• Have experience working with GHL AI features (including AI agents and voice agents).  

• Be able to refine, structure, and validate AI outputs—not just deploy them.  

• Understand where AI improves efficiency—and where manual logic and control are still required.  

If you rely on AI without understanding the underlying system logic, this role is not a fit.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The GHL Specialist reports directly to the CEO and works closely with the wider team across marketing, sales, and client delivery. You will:

• Build, manage, and optimise CRM systems inside GoHighLevel.  

• Create and maintain workflows, triggers, and automations.  

• Build and manage SMS and
 campaigns.  

• Create and optimise funnels and landing pages within GHL.  

• Manage integrations between GHL and third-party tools.  

• Monitor system performance and proactively troubleshoot issues.  

• Maintain clean pipelines, accurate contact data, and reporting dashboards.  

• Build and optimise GHL AI agents and voice agents.  

• Support onboarding of new clients into structured GHL systems.  

• Document processes and ensure systems are scalable and repeatable.  

• Create and maintain snapshots based on validated systems and workflows.  



WORK SETUP

This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone working within or close to Australian business hours.

We’re looking for someone who wants to be an integral part of a growing agency—not just complete tasks, but help build the systems behind our growth.

It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET

A supportive, growth-focused environment where your systems expertise makes a real impact.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear ownership over systems and automation  

• Structured onboarding and training aligned with our standards  

• Opportunities to deepen your expertise in automation and CRM strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of client accounts and use cases  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  

We believe strong systems are the foundation of sustainable growth—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY

If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



Send an
 to apply and Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application so we know you’ve read this in full.  

Add a link to your portfolio and resume. Make sure to include 3 professional references in your resume. 



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.

We look forward to meeting the GHL Specialist who will help power the systems behind our growth.

 AI + DESIGN CAPABILITY (IMPORTANT)

You should:

• Have strong design skills without relying on AI tools.  

• Be experienced in using AI (e.g. ChatGPT or similar tools) in a professional setting to support ideation, copy structuring, wireframing support, and workflow efficiency.  

• Know how to refine and improve AI-generated outputs to meet high design standards.  

• Understand when to use AI—and when manual design thinking is required.  



If you rely entirely on AI to produce your work without understanding design principles, this role is not a fit.



 ABOUT THE ROLE



This role reports directly to the founder and works closely with the delivery and operations team.



You will:

• Design website layouts, UI elements, and digital assets using Figma.  

• Build and execute high-quality websites in WordPress (Elementor).  

• Create supporting assets such as
 creatives, banners, and social media graphics.  

• Support branding projects and assist in developing visual identities.  

• Handle WordPress updates, content changes, and visual improvements.  

• Maintain clean and organised design systems across Figma, Adobe, and Canva.  

• Contribute ideas in team discussions and project planning.  

• Ensure all design output is accurate, on-brand, and delivered on time.  



 WORK SETUP



This is a remote role, ideally suited to someone who can work within or close to Australian (Brisbane) business hours.



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a growing agency and contribute meaningfully to client success—not just complete tasks.



It needs to be a genuine yes from both sides.



WHAT YOU’LL GET



A supportive, growth-focused environment where your creativity and ideas genuinely matter.



• A collaborative and professional team culture  

• Clear systems and expectations to support high-quality work  

• Training and onboarding to help you succeed in the role  

• Opportunities to grow your skills in design, UX/UI, and digital strategy  

• Exposure to a wide range of industries and creative projects  

• Flexibility and trust in how you manage your work  



We believe great design drives real business results—for our clients and our team.



HOW TO APPLY



If this role sounds like a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.



• Include the word “Stardust” creatively in your application  

• Attach your portfolio and resume  

• Include at least 3 professional references in your resume  



If you know someone who would be a great fit, feel free to pass this opportunity along.



We look forward to meeting the Web Designer who will help elevate our clients’ brands and digital presence.

title: Amazon FBA Account & Ops Mgr
description:
Amazon FBA Account & Operations Manager

Part-Time  |  Remote  |  RA/OA Arbitrage Business  |  Growth Role

We are a U.S.-based Amazon FBA business focused exclusively on retail arbitrage (RA) and online arbitrage (OA). We do not do private label, and we do very little wholesale. If your background is in PPC management or brand building, this is not the right fit — but if you know the grind of arbitrage account management, keep reading.



You have been here before. You know Seller Central inside and out, you have fought the cases, fixed the listings, and chased the reimbursements. We do not need to train you on the basics — we need someone who can hit the ground running and start taking things off the owner's plate immediately.



Account Management Responsibilities

Reimbursements — lost inbound shipments, warehouse damage, carrier claims

Switcharoo case management

Ungating requests

Full Seller Central case management

Updating sourcing costs in Seller Central

Monitoring and responding to performance notifications

Resolving listing issues — search suppressed, safety documentation, lost child ASINs, etc.

Buyer messages

Negative feedback removal

Stranded inventory resolution

Preparing repricer import files

Reviewing A-to-Z claims and replacement orders

Monitoring at-risk listings



Operations Responsibilities

Updating COGs in SellerBoard

Inventory management and reconciliation

Running brief weekly team check-ins

Coordinating with the owner on priorities

Maintaining team task management

Assisting with SOP creation and documentation

Identifying and flagging automation opportunities

Monitoring Amazon SP-API data within ops dashboards (ScanPower and similar tools)

Hiring, onboarding, and delegating to a small team as we grow



Requirements

Proven, hands-on experience working inside an Amazon FBA retail arbitrage or online arbitrage business — this is a must

Solid Seller Central case and account health experience

Familiarity with SellerBoard, ScanPower, or equivalent arbitrage tools

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to work independently

Strong written English communication

Available for light overlap with U.S. time zones



Compensation & Growth

Part-time to start — flexible hours, remote

$6–$10/hr based on experience

More responsibility earns more income, with performance bonus potential

Real path to Ops Manager as we grow and delegate out routine work



The goal is simple: help free the owner from the day-to-day so the business can scale. If you are the kind of person who takes ownership, solves problems without being asked, and wants to grow with a business long-term, there is real opportunity here.

 your application to

Watch the Recording - it explains exactly what I'm looking for:





Watch 3–5 minutes of this competitor video to understand the rhythm, pacing, and style:

 troubleshooting (Outlook, Gmail)

title: Online ESL Instructor
description:
Join Our Mission:



At Everest English School, our mission is to open up a world of opportunities for young learners. Unlike English education, which often focuses on test-driven learning, heavy on conventional grammar and translation, we are dedicated to equipping students with practical English communication skills. We bridge the gap between traditional education and the essential skills needed for global interactions.



We are seeking experienced and adaptable Online ESL (English as a Second Language) Instructors to teach Japanese students from Grade 1 to Grade 12. As our company continues to grow and innovate, we are entering a dynamic phase where teaching methods may evolve. Therefore, we value instructors who are open to ongoing training and flexible in adapting their instructional approaches. You will play a vital role in supporting students’ language development while helping shape the future of our learning programs.



Responsibilities:

Teach English to Japanese elementary, junior high, and high school students (ages 6–18) in a one-on-one online format

Deliver engaging, age-appropriate lessons tailored to each student’s needs and proficiency level

Adapt teaching strategies based on feedback, training, and evolving curriculum standards

Monitor student progress and provide regular feedback to both students and parents

Participate in training sessions and tea ---------- etings to stay updated on instructional changes

Maintain accurate lesson records and communicate proactively with support staff



Qualifications:

Native or Near-Native English fluency with no requirement for Japanese.

Bachelor’s degree required (preferably in Education, English, or a related field)

TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification strongly preferred

Minimum of 2 years of teaching or tutoring experience, preferably with children and/or teens

Experience teaching Japanese students is a strong plus

Ability to deliver dynamic lessons and manage classroom behavior in a virtual setting

Openness to learning and adapting teaching methods through training and feedback

Proficiency with online teaching tools; reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace required



Working Hours:

Each workday will include at least two 25-minute lessons (totaling an hour or more per day).

The expected monthly working hours are approximately 24 hours.

Lessons can be scheduled between 5:00 AM and 11:00 PM (JST).

We prioritize candidates who are available to work during weekday mornings (5:00 AM to 8:00 AM JST) and weekend mornings (5:00 AM to 12:00 PM JST).



Please include your specific availability in your application message, clearly stating which days and what times you are able to work.





Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate based on experience, qualifications, and performance



If you are interested, we kindly ask you to submit the following two items.

Please be aware that missing either item will result in an incomplete application.

1.Your most recent resume

2. 1-minute self-introduction video in English



?This will be an outsourcing (independent contractor) agreement, not a part-time employment contract.



We give priority to candidates who are available to work on weekends and public holidays.



?Please be advised that lessons and certain stages of the recruitment process may be recorded for quality assurance and training purposes. Applicants who are not comfortable with being recorded are respectfully asked not to apply.

 management

title: Full Charge Bookkeeper
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a US-based bookkeeping firm serving small and medium-sized businesses across multiple industries. We're hiring a highly skilled bookkeeper who genuinely understands US accounting standards, tax laws, and the expectations of American business owners — not just someone who knows the software. You will work directly with our clients' books and be a trusted extension of our team.



JOB DUTIES



Manage full-cycle bookkeeping for multiple US clients using QuickBooks Online and/or Xero

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and merchant accounts (Stripe, PayPal, Square, etc.) monthly

Categorize transactions accurately in accordance with US GAAP and client COAs

Prepare clean financial statements — P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow — ready for CPA review or tax filing

Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable, including aging reports

Process payroll journal entries and reconcile payroll liabilities (federal and state withholding, FICA, FUTA, SUTA)

Track sales tax obligations across multiple states and assist with preparation for filing

Assist with 1099-NEC preparation and contractor tracking at year-end

Flag issues proactively and communicate clearly with the team lead and clients in writing

Maintain organized, audit-ready files for every client



KNOWLEDGE REQUIREMENTS



US Bookkeeping Experience



3+ years working directly with US-based clients or companies

QuickBooks Online Certified



ProAdvisor certification strongly preferred

US Tax Knowledge



Solid understanding of 1099s, W-9s, payroll taxes, sales tax nexus

Accrual & Cash Accounting



Fluent in both methods and knows when each applies

Excel / Google Sheets



Comfortable building and working in complex spreadsheets

Strong written English







HIGHLY PREFERRED



Experience with QBO, 
, Gusto, ADP, 

Familiarity with Schedule C, S-Corp, and LLC taxation structures

Experience supporting a US CPA firm or bookkeeping company (not just a single employer)

Knowledge of Chart of Accounts setup and cleanup for new or messy clients

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

CPA board passer (even if not practicing) is a strong plus



WHO YOU ARE



You are meticulous, deadline-driven, and take real ownership of your clients' books. You don't wait to be told when something looks off — you catch it and say something. You are comfortable working independently across multiple clients without hand-holding. You take pride in delivering financials that are genuinely clean and ready to use.



WORK SETUP 



Full-time, 40 hours/week — must overlap at least 4 hours with US business hours (EST or PST)

Reliable high-speed internet is required (we will verify connection speed)

Must have a dedicated workspace and computer with a working camera for weekly video calls



HOW TO APPLY 



Please send your CV along with the items below to my Whatsapp at 
. 



Please include the following in your application message: (1) your years of US bookkeeping experience and the types of clients you've handled, (2) your QuickBooks Online certification status, (3) a brief explanation of the difference between cash and accrual accounting and when a small business might switch methods, and (4) your available working hours. Applications without these will not be reviewed.

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for NFL, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of NFL G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of Sport, Football(NFL) legends.



What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Senior Video Editor [ US-Based Brand ]
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________

About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

Work Ethic & Discipline

Bonus Experience

What We Offer

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.
