title: CPA
description:
This role is open exclusively to licensed CPAs (CPA board passers, PRC-registered). We are not looking for a bookkeeper who aspires to be a CPA someday — we want a credentialed accountant who chooses to do bookkeeping work with excellence.



We are a US-based bookkeeping firm serving small and medium-sized businesses across multiple industries. Our clients are real American business owners who rely on clean, accurate, timely financials to make decisions and file taxes. You will manage their books end-to-end, work directly with our team, and bring the judgment and precision that only a CPA can provide.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Own the full-cycle bookkeeping for a portfolio of US clients in QuickBooks Online

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and merchant processors (Stripe, PayPal, Square, etc.) monthly

Categorize transactions accurately using US GAAP, matching the correct chart of accounts for each client's industry

Prepare client-ready financial statements — P&L, Balance Sheet, Statement of Cash Flows — suitable for CPA review or tax preparation

Set up and clean up books for new clients, including COA structure, opening balances, and historical catch-up work

Manage accounts payable and receivable; prepare aging reports and flag collection issues

Post payroll journal entries and reconcile payroll liabilities including federal/state withholding, FICA, FUTA, and SUTA

Track multi-state sales tax obligations and prepare data for filing by state

Manage 1099-NEC contractor tracking and year-end preparation (W-9 collection, threshold review)

Identify errors, inconsistencies, and unusual transactions proactively — escalate with clear written context

Support the team during tax season with workpaper preparation, tie-outs, and client document requests

Required qualifications

CPA License



PRC-registered, CPA board passer — must be verifiable

US Bookkeeping Experience



3+ years working directly with US-based clients or employers

QuickBooks Online



Proficient; ProAdvisor certification strongly preferred

US Tax Structure Knowledge



Sole prop, LLC, S-Corp, C-Corp — you know how each affects the books

Payroll & Sales Tax



Federal/state payroll taxes, sales tax nexus, multi-state filing awareness

Strong written English



You will communicate directly with our team via Whatsapp  and our client management software

Your CPA knowledge should include

Accrual vs. cash basis — when each applies and how to switch a client from one to the other

Depreciation methods (straight-line, MACRS) and basic fixed asset tracking

Deferred revenue and prepaid expenses — proper recognition under US GAAP

Loan amortization schedules and how to book principal vs. interest splits correctly

Owner's equity accounts — draws, distributions, contributions for sole props, LLCs, and S-Corps

Understanding of Schedule C, Form 1120-S, and Form 1065 well enough to prepare clean supporting workpapers

1099-NEC vs. 1099-MISC thresholds, independent contractor classification, and W-9 requirements

Preferred

Experience with QBO, Payroll Software

Prior work at a US CPA firm, bookkeeping company, or BPO serving US clients (multi-client experience strongly preferred over single-employer)

Exposure to industry-specific bookkeeping: e-commerce, construction, real estate, professional services, or restaurants

Familiarity with cost of goods sold tracking and inventory accounting

Who you are

You passed the CPA board and you bring that level of rigor to every client file. You don't consider a reconciliation done until it actually ties. You write clearly, flag problems early, and take full ownership of your work. You are comfortable managing multiple clients independently without daily supervision. You treat every set of financials like your name is on it — because your reputation is.



WORK SETUP



Full-time, 40 hours/week — must overlap at least 4 hours with US business hours (EST or PST)

Reliable high-speed internet required (we will verify connection speed during onboarding)

Dedicated workspace, computer with working camera for weekly video calls

Must be comfortable using project management and communication tools (Slack, Asana, Google Workspace, or similar)



HOW TO APPLY 



Please send me a message on Whatsapp at 
with your CV and the following:



To be considered, your application message must include: (1) your PRC CPA license number and year you passed the board, (2) the types of US clients you've worked with and for how long, (3) your QuickBooks Online certification status, (4) a brief explanation of how you would handle onboarding a new client whose books haven't been touched in 18 months, and (5) your available working hours. Applications that don't address all five points will not be reviewed.

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Guest Experience & Operations Lead (Serviced Accommodation)
description:
We are a UK-based property investment and serviced accommodation (SA) management company. We operate seven serviced accommodation units and focus on delivering a consistent, high-standard guest experience through strong operational systems and quality control. Alongside SA operations, we run two to three active refurbishment/development projects at any given time, coordinating contractors, procurement, documentation, and stakeholder communication to deliver projects efficiently and to a high standard.



This is a hands-on Operations Lead role responsible for execution across our serviced accommodation portfolio and coordination support across refurbishment/development projects. Your core focus is proactive quality control and consistent delivery: you’ll enforce standards through checklists and evidence, ensure guests have a smooth end-to-end experience, and reduce recurring issues by continuously improving SOPs. In parallel, you’ll support project coordination for refurbishments by running follow-ups with contractors and suppliers, managing documentation, and scheduling appointments to keep workstreams moving without drift.



We’re hiring an Operations Lead who can run a cadence, enforce quality standards, and coordinate delivery across both serviced accommodation and active refurb projects.



Monday- Sunday:10:00-18:00 ( with 1 hour break) UK time, Saturday or Sunday off for one day.

Salary :700 USD Per month+ KPI bonus



Core responsibilities

Serviced Accommodation operations (delivery + standards)

- Enforce unit standards using checklists, photo evidence, and “definition of done” quality bars.

- Manage guest communications: fast responses, professional tone, calm resolution, and proactive updates.

- Maintain an issues/defects log and ensure issues are fully closed with root-cause prevention (not just “ticket closed”).

- Coordinate cleaners and operational VAs: confirm turnovers, verify quality, and drive consistent performance.

- Monitor pricing and availability: check pricing rules are being applied, flag risks/opportunities, and escalate recommendations.

- Create and update listings: listing setup, copy accuracy, amenities, house rules, photo requirements, and platform compliance (
 as applicable).

- Maintain and improve SOPs: update processes based on recurring issues, guest feedback, and operational learnings.

Property project coordination (admin execution)

- Maintain a project tracker for tasks, owners, due dates, and blockers.

- Source and compare quotes: produce a quote comparison table and recommendation.

- Follow-up with contractors, suppliers, utilities, council, other professional, keep reference numbers, paper trail, and next-step ownership.

- Documentation: build/format/update project packs, submissions, and version control.

- Appointment scheduling: inspections, contractor visits, deliveries, surveys, and access coordination.

Reporting directly to company CEO



Tools and working style

- We use Lark for communication, tracking, and internal workflows.

- Google Drive for document storage and document control.

- PMS/pricing tools as applicable (Hostaway/PriceLabs or similar).



Must-have experience

- Evidence-based quality control: Create and used checklists/audits/photo evidence used to enforce standards and reduce recurring issues.

- Serviced accommodation or hospitality ops: guest comms + turnover coordination + issue resolution.

- Property management working experience

- Vendor/contractor coordination: proactive follow-up, scheduling, and timeline control.

- Strong written English: crisp guest messaging and concise leadership updates.

- SOP ownership: has maintained/improved SOPs based on operational reality, not just followed them.

Nice-to-have experience

- Listing creation and optimization (
).

- Pricing/availability monitoring and familiarity with revenue management tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

- Property management operations or refurb coordination admin.

Personality traits we’re looking for

- Conscientious and detail-accurate.

- Proactive follow-up and ownership mindset.

- Structured and process-driven (lives in checklists/trackers).

- Calm, professional, and solution-oriented with guests and vendors.

- Improves systems continuously rather than firefighting repeatedly.

- Well organised with multiple task and able to prioritise



Hiring process:

Step 1: Answer the Google link below (required) and follow the instructions after.

Step 2: Answer scenario based questions

Step 3: Join 20-minute screening call

Step 4: Paid trial task

Step 5: Final interview + references



HOW TO APPLY:



Click the link

I’ll be in touch with you in 3-5 working days.



Please note, we ONLY accept applications through this application process. PLEASE DO NOT use the website’s message board as we don’t monitor this.

title: Financial Operations Analyst
description:
Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Financial Operations

*Manage full-cycle bookkeeping (A/R, A/P, general ledger, reconciliations)

*Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records in QuickBooks 

*Process payroll and ensure accuracy of employee compensation records

*Manage invoicing, collections, and vendor payments

*Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

*Support tax preparation by maintaining organized financial documentation



Financial Reporting & Analysis

*Prepare and maintain weekly and monthly financial reports

*Build and manage Excel-based reports and dashboards to track performance

*Analyze variances in revenue, expenses, and key financial metrics

*Track KPIs and provide clear summaries of financial performance

*Assist leadership in understanding financial trends and business health



Data Integrity & Process Improvement

*Ensure accuracy and consistency across financial data and reporting systems

*Identify discrepancies and resolve issues proactively

*Improve reporting processes and streamline financial workflows

*Collaborate with leadership to improve visibility into financial performance



Required Experience & Skills

*3+ years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or financial operations is required

*Strong experience with QuickBooks is required.

*Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, data analysis) is required

*Experience managing A/R, A/P, payroll, and reconciliations is required

*Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy

*Ability to organize and present financial data clearly

*Experience with doing financial auditing is a huge plus

*Experience supporting US-based businesses is a plus

title: Sales and Lead Generation Manager
description:
Overview

We’re looking for a proactive Virtual Sales & Lead Generation Manager to support and drive new business growth for a well known and established printing, signage and graphic design business. This role focuses on cold calling,
 outreach managing follow-ups and identify client print and signage needs.

“We are looking for someone who thinks commercially, not just executes tasks.”



Your goal is to generate qualified opportunities, including:

• Booking meetings 

• Encouraging clients to request quotes 

• Understanding and uncovering print, signage, event and marketing collateral requirements



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct cold calls to targeted prospects (events, corporates, local businesses) 

• Execute cold
 outreach using structured messaging 

• Identify client needs and uncover print, signage, marketing and event collateral needs  

• Encourage prospects to request quotes or share requirements 

• Book qualified appointments where needed in the Sydney area

• Send 2nd and 3rd follow-up
s to non-responders 

• Add and organise prospects on LinkedIn (no messaging required) 

• Maintain accurate records on Google Sheets 

• Flag high-value or urgent opportunities for immediate follow-up 



Lead Sources You Will Work With

• Existing customer database (re-engagement and upsell) 

• Google Maps, Yellowpages and Outscraper leads 

• Event and exhibitor lists (ICC Sydney and similar), Eventbrite and Industry event sites

• Local businesses and corporate offices

• Linkedin outreach to event organisers and marketing managers (not mass outreach, relationship building)



What Success Looks Like

• Consistent quote requests coming through weekly 

• Meetings booked with qualified prospects 

• Strong pipeline of opportunities (not just activity) 

• Ability to identify real opportunities, not just “touch base” 



Ideal Candidate

• Strong written English, natural and conversational tone 

• Confident with cold calling and objection handling

• 5-8 yrs Experience in lead generation, sales,
 outreach, or appointment setting 

• Ability to ask the right questions and uncover needs

• High attention to detail and organisation 

• Self-motivated, consistent, and reliable 

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets 

• Persistent, proactive, and commercially minded

• Bonus: Experience in sales & lead gen in print, signage, or marketing services



KPIs / Success Metrics

• Number of calls made per day 

•
s sent per day 

• Follow-ups completed 

• Quote requests generated

• Meetings booked

Working Structure

• Remote role (full-time) 

• Must overlap with Sydney business hours for calling 

• Daily reporting on activity and results  



Tools Used

• Phone / VOIP system 

• Gmail for
 

• Google Sheets 

• LinkedIn (connection adding only)

• Gmail for



Important Note

You will be provided with scripts and structure, but success in this role comes from thinking commercially, asking the right questions, and identifying real opportunities.

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

title: TikTok Content Operation Supervisor
description:
Job Responsibilities

- Develop and execute TikTok content growth strategies for our luggage brand, driving exposure, quality, and GMV conversion.

- Plan and manage account content aligned with platform trends, user needs, and promotional campaigns.

- Analyze video performance, track goals, and capture industry and platform hot topics.

- Produce localized, original content for the Indonesian TikTok account (shooting and editing).

- Collaborate with the live operations team to create highlight content, ensuring high-quality materials that maximize conversion.



Job Requirements

- College degree or above (education flexible with strong experience); fluent spoken English for daily communication.

- Skilled in short video shooting (camera/phone) and editing software (PR/CapCut); basic team management experience.

- 1+ year of TikTok/IG short video content creation and operations; strong creativity and content planning skills.

- Solid understanding of TikTok’s content and traffic mechanisms; strong data analysis skills to optimize strategies.

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

- Existing network of TikTok influencers in Philippines.

title: Operations & Admin Assistant
description:
Important Note Before Applying



This role provides administrative and tracking support to our internal operations team. You

will assist with structured, repeatable processes that keep our reporting, notes, and action items

accurate and up to date.

This role does not involve decision-making, strategy, or people management. It requires strong

attention to detail, comfort with routine tasks, and reliable follow-through using clear templates

and instructions.



JOB DESCRIPTION



Snoice is a community-driven dessert and catering brand based in San Diego. Our operations

team manages hiring, scheduling, performance reviews, events, and internal systems.

We are hiring an Operations & Admin Assistant to support our operations leaders by taking

ownership of tracking, reporting, documentation, and follow-through tasks that currently

take up significant admin time. This role helps ensure our systems stay clean so leaders can

focus on coaching, decisions, and execution.

This is a support and coordination role, not a leadership role.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Tracking & Reporting Support

? Update weekly trackers for reviews, loyalty, and internal metrics

? Pull date-range reports and enter results into templates

? Format and post flash reports or summaries as instructed

? Maintain consistency and accuracy across reports



Meeting Notes & Action Item Admin

? Pull meeting summaries from Fathom

? Format and share summaries in the appropriate documents or channels

? Review auto-created Trello action items and:

? Assign owners when clearly stated

? Add due dates if already discussed

? Move cards to the correct lists

? Flag items that need clarification before assignment



Shift Notes & Ops Documentation

? Collect shift notes from 

? Log notes into Sheets or Trello using templates

? Tag issues related to equipment, inventory, or store operations

? Flag items that require ops lead review



Admin Support & Board Updates

? Keep Trello boards clean and up to date

? Update card statuses based on instructions

? Ensure required fields are completed

? Log outcomes of meetings, check-ins, or decisions once finalized



Weekly Support

? Send one short weekly recap outlining:

? Work completed

? Items needing clarification

? Any blockers or missing information



TOOLS & COLLABORATION

? Google Sheets & Google Drive

? Trello

? Fathom (viewing summaries only)

? 
 for task-related communication



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

? Strong attention to detail and organization

? Experience with admin work, data entry, or reporting

? Comfortable working with Google Sheets and Trello

? Clear, professional written English

? Ability to follow templates and instructions closely

? Reliable availability for 5–10 consistent hours per week



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

? Trackers and reports are consistently up to date

? Action items are clearly assigned and easy to follow

? Shift notes and ops issues are logged and organized

? Ops leaders spend less time on admin and follow-ups

Accuracy, consistency, and reliability matter more than speed.



COMMITMENT & EXPECTATIONS

? Long-term role with consistent weekly engagement

? Support-focused position assisting operations leadership

? Clear processes and expectations provided

? Reliability and follow-through are essential



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:

? A brief summary of your experience with admin, data entry, tracking, or reporting

? Your availability within the 20 hrs/week range

? Confirmation that you are comfortable working from defined processes at $4/hour

Applications that demonstrate attention to detail, reliability, and clarity will be prioritized.

title: Guest Communication & Concierge Specialist
description:
About us

We operate a portfolio of luxury short-term rentals in Austin, Texas. Our Airbnb profile holds Superhost status for over a decade — a standard we take seriously and are committed to maintaining. We aim to consistently deliver 5-star guest experiences across every stay. This role starts at 25 hours per week. As you build a proven track record of performance and as the business continues to scale, you can expect your hours to grow alongside it.



Estimated schedule



Thursday: 2-9pm CST

Friday: 4:30-9pm CST

Saturday: 4:30-10pm CST

Sunday: 8am - 4pm CST



What you'll do

Guest communications



- Respond promptly to guest inquiries and booking requests on Airbnb and VRBO via Hospitable

- Handle pre-arrival questions, check-in instructions, and in-stay issues

- Manage guest reviews and follow-up messages post-checkout

- Monitor and maintain Hostbuddy AI responses — correcting inaccuracies and keeping content up to date

- Escalate urgent issues to the manager or cleaner as needed, particularly during night hours (CDT)

- Coordinate with cleaners or maintenance when property issues are reported





Concierge & guest experience



Coordinate concierge-level requests including private chef bookings, boat rentals, and transportation arrangements

Assist with restaurant reservations, group activity bookings, and special experience requests

Proactively anticipate guest needs to elevate the overall stay experience and drive 5-star reviews



- Plus/Advantage: Accounting, Bookkeeping, Tagging experience



What we're looking for



- Excellent in written and verbal  English — clear, warm, and professional, with 3+ years of STR management experience

- Proven ability to handle complex guest issues, multi-property management, and escalations

- Comfortable working the scheduled evening and weekend shifts to cover peak guest activity hours

- Hands-on experience with Airbnb, VRBO, Hospitable, and Hostbuddy AI is highly preferred

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated home workspace

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to problem-solve with minimal supervision





What we offer



- $5–8/hour depending on experience · Paid bi-weekly

- 100% remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Hours can grow as you demonstrate strong performance and as the business continues to scale

- Salary increase and potential performance incentives as the role and business expand





Open to agencies & service companies

If you represent a company that provides 24/7 guest communication and concierge support at a fixed monthly rate, we'd love to hear from you as well. Please reach out with an overview of your services and pricing.



How to apply

Please apply with a short intro vide (max 2 minutes) about yourself, your experience in STR guest communications or hospitality, and why you're a strong fit for this role. Send your resume through this job post and make sure any file links are set to public or viewable via a shared drive link. Sent it via
 erwin at vialuxuryrentals dot com with a subject: Last+First Name - Position



NOTE: Failure to follow the instructions won't be considered.

title: Post-Production Video Editor - Quality Control (AI Video Workflow - Vidrush)
description:
My name is Rick, and we’re building a network of YouTube channels across multiple niches using AI-assisted workflows.



We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented editor to handle post-production and quality control for full edited AI-generated videos.



This is not a traditional editing role - the great thing is that the videos are full generated using Vidrush in about 45 minutes which will save a tremendous amount of time. Your job is to refine, improve, and optimize them for better visual hooks, re-hooks, engagement and retention.



Example of a final vidrush edit without post production quality control- 



What You’ll Do:



-Generate scripts and voiceovers using AI tools

-Use Vidrush to generate the base video

-Watch the full ~20 minute video output

-Improve the video manually, including:

-Fixing mismatched or irrelevant clips

-Replacing weak visuals

-Adding motion graphics, zooms, or overlays

-Improving pacing and retention

-Create or refine the AI-generated thumbnails

-Upload Videos on YouTube



Important: What We Expect



You are not just “checking” videos — you are responsible for making sure:



-Visuals match the narration accurately

-The video stays engaging throughout

-There are no slow or boring sections

-The content does not feel low-quality or obviously AI-generated



Output Expectations:



-1 video every other day

-Consistent delivery and meeting deadlines is critical



Requirements:



-Experience with YouTube automation or faceless content

-Strong understanding of pacing, retention, and visual storytelling

-Ability to improve existing content (not just create from scratch)

-Thumbnail design experience

-High attention to detail

-Reliable and able to work independently



Bonus (not required):

-Experience with Vidrush or similar AI tools





Compensation:



$375/month

Long-term role with opportunity to grow as we scale



How to Apply:



Start your application with your favourite animal.



Include:



-2–3 relevant examples of your work

-Any experience with AI-generated content or automation

-A short explanation of how you would improve a weak video

title: Growth Marketing & Partnerships Assistant (Advertorials, Influencer Outreach, Affiliate Marketing)
description:
We are a fast-growing women's health and wellness brand focused on hormonal health education and science-backed products. Our mission is to help women understand and optimize their hormones through clinically supported solutions and expert education.



We are looking for a highly proactive Growth Marketing Assistant to help us scale customer acquisition through advertorial funnels, influencer partnerships, and affiliate marketing. This is a hands-on execution role working directly with the founder.



The Role

You will help us launch and test new growth channels quickly, including:



• advertorial marketing funnels

•
 ad page setup

• influencer and creator partnerships

• affiliate program management

• landing page creation and optimization



We move fast and test quickly. The right candidate is organized, scrappy, detail-oriented, and comfortable experimenting.



Key Responsibilities

1. Advertorial Funnel Creation

Create and manage advertorial landing pages that educate customers before they reach the product page.



Tasks include:



• Creating advertorial pages such as

“6 Reasons Why…” style articles

educational landing pages

editorial-style product explainers



• Using AI tools (Claude or ChatGPT) to generate:

copy drafts

page structure

wireframes



• Working with designers to implement pages

• Testing multiple advertorial versions to improve conversions

• Linking advertorials to: product pages, checkout, Amazon listings

• Tracking performance and suggesting improvements.



2. Domain & Ad Page Setup

Help create new marketing domains and ad accounts.

Tasks include:



• Managing marketing domains

• Setting up
 pages associated with those domains

• Creating ad accounts tied to those pages

• Adding legal disclaimers and brand information

• Uploading profile images and branding assets.



3. Landing Page Creation

Build and optimize landing pages for campaigns.

Tools may include:



• PageDeck or similar builders

• Shopify pages

• landing page tools



Responsibilities:

• Create landing pages from wireframes

• implement CTAs and purchase links

• add tracking pixels

• ensure pages load quickly and function correctly.



4. Tracking & Pixel Management

Ensure marketing data is properly tracked.



Tasks include:



• Installing tracking pixels on pages (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

• checking conversion tracking

• verifying data accuracy

• reporting results from campaigns.



5. Influencer & Creator Outreach

Identify and partner with creators who can feature our products in their content.



Tasks include:

• Finding creators on: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube

• Contacting creators for partnerships.



6. Creator Partnership Management

Manage influencer collaborations from start to finish.

Responsibilities include:

• negotiating CPM-based payments

• coordinating content timelines

• ensuring creators tag our brand

• tracking impressions and performance

• managing creator relationships.



7. Affiliate Program Management

Help scale our affiliate marketing program.



Tasks include:

• recruiting new affiliates

• onboarding them into platforms

• managing payouts and tracking

• monitoring performance.



Tools You Will Use

Examples include:



• AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT)

•
 Ads Manager

• landing page builders (PageDeck or similar)

• affiliate platforms

• influencer databases

• Google Sheets / Notion.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• has experience in digital marketing or growth marketing

• is extremely organized and detail-oriented

• is comfortable using AI tools

• enjoys testing marketing experiments quickly

• has very strong English communication skills

• is proactive and independent.



Bonus if you have experience with:



• advertorial marketing

• landing page optimization

• affiliate marketing

• influencer outreach

•
 ads setup.

title: Bookkeeper - UK  - FreeAgent
description:
UK Bookkeeper Needed, FreeAgent Experience Essential



We are a UK based agency looking for an experienced bookkeeper to support our finance operations.

You will be responsible for reconciling invoices and transactions in FreeAgent, chasing outstanding invoices, and ensuring accounts are clean and accurate so they can be handed over to our UK accountant.

This is an ongoing role, not a one off task.



Key responsibilities

Reconcile sales and purchase invoices in FreeAgent

Match bank transactions and ensure correct VAT treatment

Chase outstanding invoices professionally and consistently

Keep accounts fully up to date and audit ready

Prepare clean handover for our UK accountant



Requirements

Proven experience with FreeAgent

Strong understanding of the UK accounting and tax system, including VAT

Experience working with UK businesses

Excellent attention to detail and clear communication

Ability to work independently and follow processes



How to apply



Apply here first. Then search for Munro Agency online. Navigate to the website footer, find the vacancies section, and locate the Bookkeeper role. Follow the instructions and complete the application form.

title: Cost Estimator (Roofing – New Construction & Existing Buildings)
description:
We are seeking a skilled Cost Estimator with experience in the roofing industry to accurately assess project costs for both new construction and existing buildings, with a strong focus on commercial roofing systems, including TPO roofs. 



The ideal candidate will be responsible for reviewing blueprints, specifications, and site conditions; conducting takeoffs and measurements; analyzing labor and material costs; and preparing detailed, accurate, and competitive estimates. 



This role requires knowledge of commercial roofing assemblies, TPO installation methods and materials.



The candidate should be highly analytical, detail-oriented, and able to collaborate effectively with contractors, project managers, and clients to ensure accurate proposals and smooth project planning.



Must follow this link and fill out the form to apply

title: Project Manager – Growth & User Acquisition
description:
Project Manager – Growth & User Acquisition (Philippines)



- WorkWhale is a newly launched job platform for Filipino job seekers and we need a driven, self-sufficient Project Manager to own and grow our paid subscriber base from the ground up.



Your Job



- Plan, manage and execute a daily strategy to find Filipino job seekers, sell them on the platform, and convert them to paying subscribers. You choose your methods: organic outreach, community posting, paid ads, or anything that works. This is your project to own and deliver.



You Must Be:



- Based in the Philippines

- Experienced in project management, digital marketing, or lead generation

- Able to plan and execute your own acquisition strategy independently

- Target-driven and entrepreneurial — you think like a business owner

- Fluent in Filipino and English



Compensation



- $500/month base salary

- Significant performance bonuses tied to paid conversions — the more you deliver, the more you earn

- All tools and ad spend are self-funded from your package



To Apply, Answer These 2 Questions:



- What strategy would you use to acquire 2000 paying subscribers for a new job platform in the Philippines every month?

- Have you independently managed a growth or acquisition project before? Tell us about it.



Applications without answers to all 2 questions will not be reviewed.

title: US Service business office manager required
description:
**Senior Remote Office Manager - Operations Leader (Home Services Company)**



We are hiring a **high-level Remote Office Manager** to oversee daily operations for a growing home services company (fireplaces, chimneys, air ducts, dryer vents). This is a leadership role, not an assistant position. We are looking for someone capable of managing operations as if this were their own business.



The role focuses on supervising dispatchers, monitoring technicians, managing workflow performance, protecting company revenue, and stepping in when needed to keep operations running efficiently.



**Responsibilities:**



* Manage and supervise 2 dispatchers

* Oversee scheduling for multiple field technicians

* Monitor incoming customer leads and help move them toward booking

* Support lead conversion and job completion tracking

* Intervene in dispatch operations when needed throughout the day

* Handle invoicing through our CRM system

* Perform technician commission and salary calculations

* Track job revenue and company balances

* Follow up with contractors and partners to ensure payments are completed on time

* Ensure jobs are documented correctly and billed properly

* Maintain constant coordination through Slack and GoHighLevel (GHL)

* Provide daily operational updates and performance feedback



**Requirements:**



* Strong professional English communication

* Proven experience managing operations in a home services company

* Experience coordinating field technicians remotely

* Ability to oversee dispatch activity rather than perform constant call answering

* Comfortable handling customer pressure and emotional situations while protecting company interests

* Confident ensuring customers complete payments for completed work

* Strong decision making and accountability mindset

* Familiar with GoHighLevel (GHL) preferred

* Highly organized and dependable



**Work Commitment:**



* Expected availability of 60 to 70 hours per week

* Role involves overseeing operations throughout the day rather than constant replying

* Looking for someone serious about long-term growth with the company

* Promotion opportunity guaranteed within 6 months for the right candidate 



**Position Details:**



* Fully remote 

* Flexible structure with high responsibility

* Weekly or bi-weekly payment 

* Compensation depends on experience

* Long-term leadership growth opportunity



Work hours are US-FL Time 7am to 7pm.



This position is ideal for someone capable of managing dispatchers, supporting technicians, handling customer situations professionally under pressure, and ensuring the business runs efficiently while protecting revenue.

title: SMS Campaign Specialist (Real Estate )
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: SMS Campaign Specialist

Location: Remote (Must work EST hours)

Job Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hours/week

Start Date: Immediate (within the next 7 days)



About Us:



We’re a growing real estate investment company focused on off-market deals. Our acquisition team works directly with motivated sellers, and SMS outreach is a core channel for generating leads.



This is not a general VA role. We’re hiring ONLY experienced SMS specialists. If SMS was just 20% of your last job, this position is not for you.



Who We’re Looking For:



– You’ve managed daily SMS outreach as your main job — not just as a side task

– You’ve worked with tools like Launch Control, GoHighLevel, Smarter Contact, etc.

– You understand deliverability, compliance, opt-out logic, and spam filters

– You know how to tag leads, track replies, and move qualified prospects into CRM

– You’re not using a phone — you’ve used professional platforms and tools

– You can handle 1,500+ outbound texts/day and rotate templates properly

– You’re available full-time (45 hrs/week), working EST hours



Key Responsibilities:



– Run high-volume SMS campaigns daily using proper systems

– Monitor responses and qualify leads based on script and criteria

– Manage templates and rotate messages to avoid filtering

– Tag leads accurately and track campaign metrics

– Coordinate with acquisition and data teams to align campaigns



Required Experience:



– Minimum 1 year managing SMS outreach full-time

– Real estate investment or wholesaling background is a major plus

– Strong written English — clear, professional, and natural tone

– Familiarity with CRMs and SMS platforms

– Must be organized, reliable, and fully independent



How to Apply:



We only review serious applications from experienced SMS specialists.



Apply using the link below:







Incomplete applications or generic submissions will not be reviewed.

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:







Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: Multimedia Designer
description:
The ideal candidate will:

*Show competency in videography principles from scripting through final editing and show proficiency with branding guidelines using Adobe CS and video motion software such as Premier Pro, Motion, and/or After Effects, Premiere and Final Cut Pro in an Apple Mac environment.

*Pre-visualize and/or storyboard shot ideas based on scripts or project outlines.

*Perform non-linear editing using Final Cut or Adobe Premiere software and designs after effects as needed including motion graphics, layout, and animation

*Be able to select and use music to match the tone and style of the episode and story

*Be able to create various types of audio / video to tell stories across multiple platforms

*Be able to mix different media into a complete experience (video, graphics, music).

*Experience in typography, color, composition, compositing, key framing, and title design.

*Be detail-oriented and possess a sophisticated editing style

*Knowledge of social media and how to engage audiences on digital platforms in the public space is essential to this role

*Ability to work with a team directly in edit sessions to assess needs and meet project requirements.

*Properly maintain a digital archive

*Possess a strong attention to detail and time managements skills, and be an organized team player

*Have experience working in a fast-paced environment on weekly deadlines

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 45 wpm+)

*provide their own video and audio equipment



Job responsibilities include:

*Advise and coach the team on lighting, audio and video requirements  to ensure quality footage for use in post-production

*Manage our podcast production schedule for Rosie Radio, including managing workflow; and capture, editing, and uploading of podcasts to various online channels (iTunes [Libsyn], YouTube, blog, etc)

*Play a highly collaborative creative role in structuring new ideas and managing production projects to completion

*Edit online content for YouTube and 
, including podcast episodes, storytelling videos, and how-to videos

*Create and produce marketing videos and PR videos, as needed

*Sourcing photos, stock video and audio as needed for projects

*Create all multimedia content for social (audio / video / design)

*Edit and upload footage and maintain video logs and media storage

*Create motion graphics for video

*Design online / social graphics for various projects



Qualifications

*Well-versed in Adobe Premiere, along with the rest of Adobe CC software (After Effects, Photoshop, etc)

*Experience creating media for social and the web

*Experience in storytelling via videography

*Knowledge of video codecs and encoding software

*Expertise with multicam editing

*A strong understanding of editing workflows and file structuring

*Ability to color correct and mix audio

*Knowledge and experience with video lighting and basic set setup



Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Need to have professional editing software (Licensed Adobe Premiere)



Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 3PM - 7PM CST // Monday - Friday 5AM - 9AM PH Time



This is a PART-TIME role with a salary range of PHP28,000 -38,000 monthly,  



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Web and Multimedia Designer
description:

*Show competency in videography principles from scripting through final editing and show proficiency with branding guidelines using Adobe CS and video motion software such as Premier Pro, Motion, and/or After Effects, Premiere and Final Cut Pro in an Apple Mac environment.

title: AI Fashion Designer (Womenswear) – Trend-Driven / Commercial Focus
description: We are a fast-growing fashion brand focused on AI-driven womenswear design and commercial product development for the US, Mexico, and Colombia markets. We are looking for a designer who understands what sells — not just what looks good. In this role, you will use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, and Gemini to create 2–5 fashion-forward designs daily based on target customer preferences. You will be responsible for developing dresses, two-piece sets, skirts, tops, and jumpsuits that are trend-driven, body-enhancing, and suitable for mass production. The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of fast fashion brands such as Fashion Nova, Zara, and Revolve, and knows how to design for different body types including US, Latina, and Black customers. You must understand fabric usage (stretch vs non-stretch), fit, and how to create high-conversion styles. Attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions precisely are critical. As part of the application, you are required to submit 2–3 AI-generated womenswear design concepts for our target markets, including design concept, target customer, AI tools used, and why the design will sell. This is a performance-driven role with long-term opportunity for designers who can consistently create commercially successful products.

title: Marketing & Ops Systems Manager
description:
JOB RESPONSIBILITIES INCLUDE BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO:



Process Mapping & Funnel Mapping

*Create and maintain process maps on L
 that clearly outline workflows, ownership, dependencies, and handoffs across teams

*Develop funnel maps that document the full customer journey—from traffic source to conversion, follow-up, and retention

*Ensure funnel maps align with execution plans, tools, and automation requirements

*Translate funnel and process maps into actionable task lists and SOPs for designers, developers, and marketers

*Identify gaps, inefficiencies, or breakdowns in workflows and proactively recommend improvements to the COO/CEO

*Break down mapped processes and funnels into clear, executable workflows for the team, to be mobilized in Trello

*Ensure SOPs, checklists, and processes are documented and followed consistently

*Proactively flag risks and tool or personnel challenges with recommended solutions



Reporting & Communication

*Participate in project calls to ensure projects are being executed well, in alignment with established workflows and processes

*Attend project meetings to track all details needed to design processes and determine action items, and follow-through

*Maintain concise, execution-focused communication across all stakeholders



EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS REQUIRED:

*2-3 years of experience in an Ops environment mapping marketing and operational processes, workflows, and training programs

*At least 3 years’ experience on Marketing Team, delivering work aligned with funnel builds, website builds, social media marketing, media buying, etc.

*Proven ability to turn complex projects into clear SOPs and execution plans that work well for remote creative and technical teams

*Intermediate to advanced experience with process mapping tools (e.g., L
)

*Advanced proficiency with project management tools and automations (Monday, Trello, Click Up, etc)

*Experience working on marketing projects involving:

**WordPress websites

**Funnels (ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, Kartra preferred)

*
 marketing and automation

**Multimedia Design:  Brand Guides, Logos, UX/UI Design, various graphics, etc

**Analytics & Ads (Google Analytics, GTM, Looker Studio/Data Studio)

*Strong written and verbal English communication skills

*Highly organized, analytical, and proactive problem-solver

*Comfortable working with tools such as:

**Trello & Slack

**Google Workspace

**Zoom 

**Password management tools

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 55 wpm+)



TECH REQUIREMENTS

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed



Job Type: Part-Time (20-40 hrs weekly)

Schedule: 3PM to 7PM CST Sunday to Thursday // Monday to Friday 4AM to 8AM PHT

Salary Range: Php
hourly, depending on experience

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

description:

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.

We build long-term careers.

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

What We’re Looking For

Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.

title: VIDEO CLIPPER — 60,000 PHP/MONTH
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Creative Designer
description:

*Be able to mix different media into a complete experience (video, graphics, music).

*Be detail-oriented and possess a sophisticated editing style

*Knowledge of social media and how to engage audiences on digital platforms in the public space is essential to this role

*Properly maintain a digital archive

*Possess a strong attention to detail and time managements skills, and be an organized team player

*Have experience working in a fast-paced environment on weekly deadlines

*Demonstrate a solid typing WPM (ideally 45 wpm+)

*provide their own video and audio equipment



Job responsibilities include:

*Manage our podcast production schedule for Rosie Radio, including managing workflow; and capture, editing, and uploading of podcasts to various online channels (iTunes [Libsyn], YouTube, blog, etc)

*Play a highly collaborative creative role in structuring new ideas and managing production projects to completion

*Edit online content for YouTube and 
, including podcast episodes, storytelling videos, and how-to videos

*Create and produce marketing videos and PR videos, as needed

*Sourcing photos, stock video and audio as needed for projects

*Create all multimedia content for social (audio / video / design)

*Edit and upload footage and maintain video logs and media storage

*Create motion graphics for video

*Design online / social graphics for various projects



Qualifications

*Well-versed in Adobe Premiere, along with the rest of Adobe CC software (After Effects, Photoshop, etc)

*Experience creating media for social and the web

*Experience in storytelling via videography

*Knowledge of video codecs and encoding software

*Expertise with multicam editing

*A strong understanding of editing workflows and file structuring

Tech Requirements:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

Work core hours are from Sunday - Thursday 3PM - 7PM CST // Monday - Friday 4AM - 8AM PH Time

title: Ecommerce & Social Media Specialist
description:
We run two ecommerce stores and need a reliable, self-sufficient all-rounder to take ownership of the day-to-day digital operations. We've been burned before by people who talk a big game and underdeliver, so we're being very direct about what this role is and what we expect.



If you're the kind of person who figures things out, takes initiative, and actually gets things done without being chased, this role is for you. If you need constant hand-holding please don't apply.



What you'll be doing:



- Creating and scheduling social media content across platforms (primarily Meta) — both static graphics and short-form video

Using AI tools (such as CapCut, Canva AI, Runway, or similar) to produce video ads and static creatives for Meta campaigns — you don't need to be a professional videographer, but you need to be genuinely comfortable producing decent ad content using AI tools

- Monitoring stock levels across both stores and flagging low inventory or sourcing issues before they become problems

- Sourcing and coordinating UGC (user-generated content) creators — finding suitable creators, outreach, managing deliverables

- General ecommerce admin — product listings, order management support, basic store maintenance

- SEO tasks are a significant advantage — if you have experience with on-page SEO, product page optimisation, or ecommerce SEO specifically, make sure you tell us



What we require:



- Proven hands-on experience in ecommerce — you need to understand how online stores actually operate, not just in theory

- Real experience creating content for Meta 
/Instagram) — not just posting, but understanding what performs and why

- Comfortable working independently across multiple tasks and stores without needing daily direction

- Strong written English for content creation and creator outreach

- Familiarity with AI content tools — we're not expecting Hollywood production quality, but you need to be able to produce clean, usable ad content

- Reliable setup — fast internet, your own computer, no recurring power or connectivity issues



What will make you stand out:



- Experience managing or running Meta ad campaigns (even at a basic level)

- Knowledge of Shopify or a similar ecommerce platform

- SEO experience — on-page, product descriptions, keyword research

- Previous experience sourcing or managing UGC creators

- Having worked across more than one brand or store at the same time



Interview process:

Shortlisted candidates will be given a small practical task — we'll ask you to create a sample social post or short video ad using AI tools for a fictional product. This will be paid. We want to see how you actually work, not just what you say you can do.



To apply:

In your application, please answer the following:



1. What ecommerce platforms have you worked on and in what capacity?

2. What AI tools do you currently use for content creation, and show us an example if you have one

3. Have you sourced UGC creators before? If yes, briefly describe how you approached it

title: AI Fashion Designer (Womenswear) – Commercial / Trend-Based
description:
We are a womenswear fashion brand focused on creating high-selling, trend-driven styles using AI tools. We are looking for an AI Fashion Designer who can quickly turn ideas, references, and trends into commercially viable products for the US, Mexico, and Colombia markets.



This role is not about artistic design — it is about creating products that sell.



You will use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, and other platforms to generate, refine, and iterate designs. You must be able to take existing styles and transform them into new, improved versions with better fit, stronger visual impact, and higher selling potential.



Your daily work includes developing dresses, two-piece sets, skirts, tops, and jumpsuits, and creating multiple variations (prints, colors, cuts) from one core idea. Speed, efficiency, and commercial thinking are critical.



The ideal candidate understands fast fashion brands like Fashion Nova, Zara, and Revolve, and knows how to design for different customer groups, especially US, Latina, and Black women. You must understand garment structure, fabric behavior (stretch vs non-stretch), and how to design pieces that enhance body shape and drive conversions.



You must be highly detail-oriented and able to follow instructions exactly. If you cannot follow specific design requirements, this role is not suitable.



As part of the application, you are required to submit 2–3 AI-generated womenswear designs, including:

 • Design concept

 • Target customer

 • AI tools used

 • Why the design will sell



Applications without this will not be considered.



This is a performance-based role with long-term opportunities for designers who can consistently create designs that convert into sales.

title: GHL-certified GoHighLevel VA — CRM Setup & Admin Training
description:
Mr Neate Cleaning · Melbourne, Australia (remote role) · Project-based with strong long-term potential



This is a project-based role that transitions into ongoing support. You must have hands-on GoHighLevel experience — not just theoretical knowledge. If you have not actually built pipelines, workflows, and custom fields inside GHL, please do not apply.



About the business

Mr Neate Cleaning is a professional carpet cleaning company based in Melbourne, Australia. We use GoHighLevel as our CRM and central operations hub. Our tech stack includes GHL, Jobber, QuickBooks Online, and a WordPress website with an embedded GHL booking form.



We have an existing GHL sub-account that needs to be correctly rebuilt from the ground up — and a Philippines-based office admin (Kim) who needs to be properly trained on GHL before we go live on the new setup.



What you will be doing

This is a structured 6-phase project. A full brief will be provided. At a high level:



Phase 1 — Rebuild custom fields, pipeline, booking form, and contact tags in GHL (you work alone, no disruption to live system)

Phase 2 — Train Kim on GHL fundamentals across 6 structured modules. Identify and correct bad habits. Kim signs off each module before you proceed.

Phase 3 — Migrate contacts and opportunities to the new pipeline, update workflows, tidy old data, apply DND list, restrict Kim's access role

Phase 4 — Build 8 automations/workflows (enquiry handling, booking confirmation, reminders, review requests, anniversary follow-ups, invoice follow-ups)

Phase 5 — Write 10 SOPs with screenshots and Loom walkthroughs, written for Kim specifically

Phase 6 — Assist with Jobber ? GHL integration via GHL App Marketplace (no Zapier)



Requirements — must have all of these

GoHighLevel certification (please state which certification in your application)

Proven hands-on GHL experience: pipelines, custom fields, workflows, forms, contact management, invoicing

Experience training non-technical users on GHL — not just building, but explaining

Ability to write clear, simple SOPs with screenshots (Loom video experience a strong plus)

Strong written English — Kim will be learning from your documentation

Reliable internet, quiet working environment, availability for regular check-in calls with the business owner (AEST timezone)



Nice to have

Experience with Jobber or other field service management software

Familiarity with Australian GST (tax-inclusive pricing)

Experience with service-based businesses (trades, home services, cleaning)

Previous experience working directly with a business owner, not through an agency



What we offer

Full project brief provided upfront — you will know exactly what is expected before you start

Direct communication with the business owner throughout — no middlemen, no agency

Competitive rate based on experience — please state your expected hourly or project rate in your application

Strong potential for ongoing work beyond this project. This business is actively growing and the right person will have the opportunity to take on additional projects — including further GHL development, other tech stack work, and ongoing monthly system support. We are not looking for someone to do one job and disappear. If you do great work, there will be more of it.



How to apply

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Please send a message that includes:



- Your GHL certification(s) and how long you have been working in GHL

- A specific example of a GHL pipeline or workflow you built — describe what it did and any challenges you solved

- Have you trained someone else on GHL? If yes, briefly describe who and how.

- Your availability (hours per week, timezone) and your expected rate — please give a specific number, not a range, and do not ask what our budget is. Applications that say 'negotiable' or ask us to name a figure first will not be considered.

- Start your message with the words: "I have read the full job description" — this confirms you have read everything



Mr Neate Cleaning · Melbourne, Australia · ABN
· Remote role for Philippines-based applicants

• Sound judgement and estimating ability  

• Strong math skills  

• Use of precision tools  

• Cutting and shaping materials and joining them with 

nails, screws, bolts or glue  

• Developing work plans  

• Look through blueprints and drawings to determine 

requirements for interior finishing work 

• Selecting, measuring and marking materials for 

interior paneling, trim or moldings  

• Reading and interpreting blueprints  

• Assist in installing wood and plastic paneling on 

walls and doors, while maintaining an aesthetic 

look of the surface responsible for installing, repairing, and maintaining interior surfaces such as drywall, plaster, and trim to ensure a polished and professional finish. This role requires precise measurements, cutting, fitting, and finishing techniques to achieve smooth, durable results that meet design specifications. Expertise in reading blueprints and working with various materials is essential for delivering high-quality interior finishes in residential and commercial construction projects.



Role:

Specializes in the final touches that complete a building's interior. This role involves installing finished surfaces, including drywall, trim, molding, and cabinetry with precision and skill.



You ensure that floors, walls, and ceilings are prepared and polished according to design specifications. Enhancing both the aesthetic appeal and functionality of interior spaces.



Key Responsibilities, crucial role in completing the aesthetic and functional aspects of interior spaces. Your responsibilities involve applying finishes that enhance the visual appeal and durability of walls, ceilings, and floors.



Surface Preparation - Prepare walls, ceilings, and floors by sanding, cleaning, and repairing to ensure smooth and even surfaces before finishing.



Application of Finishes - Apply paint, wallpaper, plaster, or other decorative finishes with precision and attention to detail.



Material Handling - Measure, cut, and install molding, trim, and other interior detailing components efficiently and accurately.

Essential Skills for Interior Finishers



What are the essential skills for an interior finisher to excel in construction projects?



Must have a keen eye for detail to ensure smooth and flawless surfaces. Proficiency in reading blueprints and technical drawings is crucial to accurately follow design specifications.



Tools and Materials: 

Use a variety of specialized tools such as trowels, putty knives, and sanding blocks to achieve smooth and precise surfaces. Common materials include drywall, plaster, joint compound, and various types of molding and trim to create a polished final look. These tools and materials ensure high-quality finishes in residential and commercial construction projects.



Safety Practices and Regulations:

Must strictly adhere to safety practices and regulations to prevent a
 and ensure a secure work environment. Proper use of personal protective equipment (PPE), safe handling of tools, and compliance with OSHA standards are critical components. Your commitment to following these guidelines protects both workers and clients throughout the interior finishing process.



Typical Work Environment: 

Work in a variety of construction sites, often indoors where they apply final touches to buildings. Your work environment involves detailed, hands-on tasks that require precision and care.



Indoor Construction Sites: 

Operate inside residential, commercial, or industrial buildings during the final stages of construction.



Variable Work Conditions: 

Work environments can range from newly built, unfinished spaces to existing structures undergoing renovation.

Use of Specialized Tools -frequently use hand and power tools, which require careful handling in confined or dust-prone settings.



Required Qualifications and Certifications:

Completing construction projects by installing drywall, trim, and other finishing materials with precision. Required qualifications include a high school diploma or equivalent and hands-on experience in carpentry or related fields.



Certifications such as OSHA 10 or 30-hour safety training and a finish carpentry certification enhance your employability and ensure compliance with industry standards. Additional credentials like a lead paint certification may be required in older buildings to guarantee safety and quality.
