title: Youtube Video Editor - FGC Podcast
description:
BROAD SCOPE

We are hiring a VOD Editor for a single gig. You will receive one long Twitch/YouTube VOD recording of a live podcast (3–5 hours). The show is a weekly FGC discussion hosted by a well-known Street Fighter commentator. You will watch the full VOD, identify every distinct conversation topic, and edit each topic into its own standalone YouTube video (15–60 minutes each, depending on the topic). You will cut dead air, remove off-topic tangents, add b-roll footage that shows what the host is talking about, and deliver finished exports ready for upload. You should expect to produce 3–5 finished videos from a single VOD. If the work is strong, there may be future gigs.



OVERVIEW & DETAILS

This is for a YouTube channel run by a veteran FGC commentator and influencer. The channel publishes standalone videos cut from a long-form weekly podcast. The audience is fighting game players and fans who follow the fighting game scene.



What you will receive:

-   One full VOD from a weekly live podcast, streamed on Twitch and YouTube. Episodes run 3–5 hours.

-   The VOD covers multiple topics per episode. A single topic can run anywhere from 15 minutes to over an hour.

-   The host may show topics on screen, but a listed topic may actually contain multiple distinct discussions.



Each VOD comes with a timestamp list or show notes when available, but you should not rely on these. You will need to watch the VOD yourself to find the real topic boundaries.



CORE OBJECTIVES

-   You are watching one full VOD (3–5 hours) and identifying every distinct conversation topic that can stand alone as a YouTube video.

-   You are editing each topic into a standalone YouTube video (15–60 minutes) with clean pacing and no dead air.

-   You are sourcing and adding relevant b-roll footage to each video that visually shows what the host is talking about.

-   You are delivering 3–5 finished, YouTube-ready video exports from a single VOD.



EXPANDED OBJECTIVES

-   Topic Identification

    -   You will receive the raw VOD file via Google Drive.

    -   Watch the full recording and log every topic the host discusses.

    -   For each topic, note the start timestamp, end timestamp, and a short summary.

    -   The host does not always announce topic changes. You will need to identify which segments belong together and which tangents to cut.

    -   Measured by: completeness of topic identification, accuracy of timestamps, quality of topic summaries.

-   Editing & Pacing

    -   Each video must make sense on its own to a viewer who has never seen the full podcast.

    -   Cut dead air, off-topic tangents, and repeated points.

    -   If the host circles back to a point, keep the best version and cut the rest.

    -   Measured by: pacing quality, no dead spots, each video stands alone as a complete topic.

-   B-Roll

    -   The raw footage is mostly a webcam of the host talking.

    -   When the host references a tournament 
nt, player, game clip, or news story, you will find and add matching b-roll.

    -   B-roll may include tournament footage, gameplay clips, screenshots of tweets or articles, or game trailers.

    -   You will source b-roll yourself from publicly available content.

    -   Measured by: b-roll relevance and timing, visual variety.

-   Delivery

    -   Final exports must be 1080p minimum with clean audio levels.

    -   Videos must be ready to upload to YouTube with no additional editing needed.

    -   Deliver all files via Google Drive.

    -   Measured by: number of usable videos delivered, export quality, delivery on time.



REQUIREMENTS

-   Required: You understand the FGC and can prove it. You know who the major players, commentators, and tournament organizers are. You follow Street Fighter 6 at minimum. You can tell the difference between a meaningful discussion topic and idle chatter. If you do not follow the FGC, do not apply.

-   Required: You know how to source and add b-roll footage. You can find relevant clips, screenshots, and images online and edit them into a video to match what the host is discussing.

-   Ideal: You have edited podcast or talk show content into topic-based cut-downs before.

-   Ideal: You actively play Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, or other competitive fighting games.

-   Ideal: Experience with YouTube audience retention and pacing for discussion content.

-   Ideal: You are familiar with the host's content.

-   Ideal: Experience with After Effects or motion graphics for lower thirds and text overlays.



HOW TO APPLY

 your application to [APPLICATION
] with the subject line: [VOD Editor Gig] Your Name



Watch this VOD:





Your application must include both of the following. Applications that are missing either item or do not follow these exact instructions will not be reviewed.



1. A test edit.

Watch the VOD. Find one topic. Edit it down to a clean 1–3 minute clip.

-   Identify a clear topic

-   Cut out any dead air

-   Cut out any redundancies

-   Cut out any tangents

-   Add 1–2 pieces of b-roll that show what the host is talking about

Upload your finished edit to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



2. A Google Sheet explaining your process.

Create a Google Sheet with exactly these column headers:

-   Topic Title

-   Timestamp (Start)

-   Timestamp (End)

-   Why This Topic Works as a Standalone Clip

-   B-Roll Used

-   Why You Chose This B-Roll

Fill in one row for the topic you selected. Explain why you think this clip is good and relevant, and why you chose the b-roll that you chose.



The first cell in your Google Sheet (A1) must contain the word "Hansei."



Share the Google Sheet link in your application. Make sure the link is set to "Anyone with the link can view."



Applications that do not follow every instruction above will not be considered.



If your application passes, you will be offered a paid gig to edit one full VOD (3–5 hours) into multiple standalone YouTube videos.

title: AI Video Editor - Long-Form (Sleep & Educational History Content)
description:
We’re hiring a full-time video editor to create long-form YouTube content (1–2+ hours) who can use AI tools and efficient batch workflows.



This role is focused on building content at scale without sacrificing quality. We are not looking for low-quality, overly AI-generated videos. The goal is to create content that feels natural, immersive, and engaging.



What You’ll Do:



-Create long-form videos (1–2+ hours), including:

-Sleep / relaxation content

-Educational / B-roll-style videos

-Use a batch workflow to generate and assemble content, for example:



1.Script + scene generation (Claude or similar)



2.Voice-over generation (via our platform)



3.Visual generation (Fal.ai, Veo, etc.)



4.Editing and assembling into a final video

Combine AI images, AI video, and real B-roll footage to create a natural viewing experience



Important: Quality Standard,we are aiming for content that:



-Feels authentic and not overly AI-generated

-Uses AI video + B-roll, not just static AI images

-Has enough visual variation to maintain engagement

-Avoids repetition and low-effort scene generation



Examples:

-

-



Workflow Expectation:



Ideally you should not be editing everything manually. We expect you to:



-Batch generate scenes and assets

-Use AI tools efficiently

-Build a workflow that balances speed + quality



Output Expectations:

-1 long-form video every other day(48 hour turnaround)

-Consistent delivery and meeting deadlines



Requirements:



-Proven experience creating long-form YouTube content (1 hour+)

-Strong understanding of pacing and retention

-Experience using AI tools for video/image generation

-Ability to combine AI videos/images + B-roll effectively

-Ability to build efficient batch workflows

-Reliable and able to work independently



Bonus (not required):



-Experience with sleep/relaxation content

-Experience with tools like Claude, Fal.ai, Veo, etc.



Compensation:

$375/month

Long-term role with growth opportunities



How to Apply:

Start your application with the name of your favourite animal and answer the screening questions or we will likely not respond,

title: Strategic Video Clipper — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US

title: Media Buyer Analyst (Linear TV)
description:
Media Buying Analyst (Linear TV)



Location: Remote – U.S. 

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time

Compensation: $1,800 USD per month 



About the Role:



Workspark is hiring a Media Buying Analyst to embed directly within a top-tier U.S. advertising agency. This is a high-impact role for a media professional who excels at the intersection of precise execution and proactive data analysis.

We are looking for an individual who sets the gold standard for remote collaboration: high responsiveness, meticulous accuracy, and the ability to scale from 2 to 4+ complex campaigns within the first 90 days. You will be expected to own your workflow, manage tight deadlines independently, and provide the transparency needed in a fast-paced agency environment.



What You Will Do:



- Plan & Execute: Launch linear TV media buys based on strategy, CPM goals, and strict budgets.

- Audit with Precision: Perform independent pre-buying audits by Month 3 to ensure flawless campaign launches and "zero-error" delivery.

- Real-Time Optimization: Monitor daily pacing and performance; make autonomous budget shifts to hit KPI thresholds (+/- 10%).

- Rapid Reconciliation: Resolve all billing and media discrepancies within a strict 48-hour business window.

- Proactive Communication: Maintain ultra-high responsiveness. You are expected to acknowledge requests within minutes and flag performance risks before they impact the campaign results.

- Analytical Logic: Use Excel/Google Sheets to interpret reports and ensure campaign data is logically sound (e.g., verifying that delivery aligns with spend and goals).



What We’re Looking For:



- Experience: 2–3+ years of agency experience specifically in Linear TV Media Buying (Digital-only experience will not qualify).

- High Initiative: A "go-getter" personality who proactively asks questions and seeks clarity early, rather than waiting for a deadline to pass.

- Time Management Mastery: Proven ability to manage multiple high-stakes deadlines (specifically the critical Thursday 5:00 PM buy deadline) without procrastination.

- Communication Fluency: Excellent, confident English communication skills. You must be able to explain the "why" behind your data insights clearly to internal teams.

- Problem-Solving "Street Smarts": The ability to look at a data set and quickly identify if something "feels" wrong, escalating issues with potential solutions in mind.



Technical Requirements:



- Reliable, high-speed internet with a documented backup power solution (essential for U.S. market hours).

- Functional webcam and headset for daily video collaboration and internal strategy sessions.

- Quiet, professional home office environment.



Why WorkSpark?



- Long-Term Career Stability: This is a full-time, career-track role, not a short-term contract.

- Direct U.S. Agency Exposure: Work with proprietary AI media tools and collaborate with senior industry experts.

- Payroll: Bi-monthly payments made via Wise.

- Benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave (after probation).



How to Apply:



Apply here: 

- You must provide 

1 - Updated Resume.

2 - Video/Audio introduction describing your specific experience with Linear TV reconciliation and how you prioritize tasks when managing multiple campaigns at once.



**Note: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.**

title: Paid Search Specialist
description:
Paid Search Specialist



Location - Remote

Salary: $3,000 USD/month 

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM ET (U.S. East Coast Hours)



Role Overview:



We are hiring a technical, "hands-on-keyboard" Paid Search Specialist to serve as a vital member of the media activation team for a leading U.S. data-powered marketing agency. This is an internal-facing, long-term role focused on executing and optimizing high-performing campaigns for diverse agency clients. We are looking for a practitioner who is equally capable of executing day-to-day operations and contributing strategic recommendations that drive business outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:



- Campaign Strategy & Development: Lead the end-to-end build of paid search campaigns across Google Ads and Microsoft Ads, including Search, Performance Max, Display, Video, and Demand Gen campaign types.

- Platform Mix: Focus primarily on Google Ads (90%) and Microsoft Ads (10%). (Note: No Shopping or e-commerce feed management is currently required).

- Optimization & Performance: Monitor, analyze, and optimize campaign performance on a continuous basis, including bid adjustments, budget pacing, and quality score improvements.

- Analytical Storytelling: Extract data from GA4 and native tools to draft weekly performance narratives that provide "color" and context—explaining the "why" behind the numbers for internal leads.

- Automation & Strategy: Leverage Smart Bidding and automated campaign strategies thoughtfully, validating machine learning signals against specific business requirements.

- Technical Troubleshooting: Audit and troubleshoot tracking setups, pixels, and GA4 events to ensure total data accuracy.

- Team Integration: Collaborate daily via Microsoft Teams with account leads and strategists; this is a highly outgoing, and collaborative team environment.



Requirements:



- Experience: 2–3+ years of hands-on experience managing paid search campaigns in an agency or in-house environment.

- Account Management: Proven ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously (initially 2–3, scaling to 5–6).

- Platform Proficiency: Demonstrated expertise in Search, Performance Max, Display, Video, and Demand Gen.

- Technical Skills: Strong command of keyword research methodologies, match type strategy, negative keyword management, and audience targeting.

- Analytics: Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager, and platform-native reporting tools.

- Software: Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel (for analysis) and PowerPoint (for client-friendly decks) are essential.

- Soft Skills: Must be coachable, have a learning attitude, and possess the ability to communicate strategic recommendations clearly.

- Home Setup: Reliable quiet work environment, high-speed internet, and webcam for East Coast sync calls.



Preferred Qualifications:



- Google Ads and/or Microsoft Advertising certifications.

- Experience with third-party platforms (e.g., SA360, Marin, Skai).

- Familiarity with paid social platforms (Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok) and cross-channel media strategy.

- Experience with multi-location or zip-code level optimization.



What You Get:



- Stable Role: Long-term, full-time commitment with a U.S. company.

- Support: No direct client-facing pressure initially; ongoing support from the Workspark leadership team.

- Payroll: Bi-monthly payments made via Wise.

- Benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and sick leave (after probation).



How to Apply:



Click here to apply: 

 - Important: Submit a brief video recording introducing yourself. Explain your experience with "hands-on-keyboard" campaign management and how you prefer to report wins and performance challenges to your team.



**Note: Applications without a video introduction will not be considered.**

description:

Role Overview:



We are hiring a Paid Social Specialist to support a fast-growing, data-driven marketing agency. This is an execution-focused role for a "thinker, not just a doer" who can manage high-budget campaigns while providing strategic storytelling and performance insights. You will work as an integrated member of the media activation team, primarily focusing on Meta Ads, while supporting additional platforms like TikTok and Snapchat.



Key Responsibilities:



- Campaign Execution: Lead the build, launch, and daily management of paid social programs, with a heavy emphasis on Meta (90% of budget).

- Optimization: Manage account pacing and performance through a mix of manual adjustments and platform automation (e.g., Meta Advantage+).

- Insights & Reporting: Go beyond data extraction to add "color" and storytelling to weekly performance reports, explaining the why behind the numbers.

- Strategic Collaboration: Actively participate in internal campaign brainstorming and "war room" sessions to refine cohesive cross-channel strategies.

- Troubleshooting: Monitor tracking pixels and GA4 events to diagnose issues before performance is impacted.

/Instagram).

- Proactive Communication: Flagging performance dips and providing immediate recommendations to account leads.

- Technical Mastery: Flawless campaign launches and accurate budget pacing.

- Team Synergy: Receiving high feedback for being "coachable" and "pleasant to work with" in a lively, outgoing team environment.



Requirements:

- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English skills for internal strategy collaboration.

title: VIDEO EDITOR (MUST USE ADOBE PREMIERE)
description:
Full-Time Corporate Video Editor - Interviews, Brand & Storytelling



We are a video production agency based in Australia, working with corporate brands, marketing teams, and organisations across Australia and New Zealand.



We are looking for a full-time Video Editor who specialises in corporate content — someone who understands how to craft clean, professional, story-driven videos, not just fast social edits.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants consistency, growth, and to be part of a high-quality production team.



What You’ll Be Editing-->



Interview-style corporate videos

Case studies & testimonials

Brand / company overview videos

Internal communications content



You must be able to produce work at this level (or better):











What Makes a Great Fit (Important)



This is NOT a social media editing role.



We are looking for someone who:



-Understands story structure from interviews (not just cutting clips)

-Can identify and build clear, compelling narratives

-Has a strong eye for clean, minimal, corporate-style motion graphics

-Knows how to edit with restraint, pacing, and professionalism

-Can make people look and sound credible, confident, and polished





Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



4+ years professional video editing experience



Advanced in:

-Adobe Premiere Pro

-Adobe After Effects



Strong experience with:

-Interview editing & story building

-Audio cleanup and dialogue clarity

-Basic colour correction (natural, professional look)

-Excellent English (written and spoken)

-Stable internet + professional working setup (we will test this)



Please DO NOT Apply If:

Your experience is mainly TikTok / reels / 
-style editing

You rely heavily on flashy effects or templates

You cannot confidently edit interview-based content into a strong narrative

Your communication or internet is unreliable





What You’ll Be Responsible For

Turning raw interview footage into clear, structured stories

Selecting the best soundbites and building narrative flow

Adding clean, on-brand motion graphics (titles, lower thirds, etc.)

Ensuring final videos feel professional, polished, and on-message

Working efficiently with our team using clear briefs and feedback



Application Process (STRICT)



To be considered, you MUST complete all steps:



1. Portfolio

Send your best corporate / interview-style work only

Why do you want to work with us?

Final Note

If you take pride in crafting professional, story-driven content and want to work on meaningful corporate projects — we’d love to hear from you.





*****BONUS STEP*****

Tell us (in 2–3 sentences) how you would approach editing an interview into a compelling story.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter – High Volume Cold Calls
description:
Remote Cold Calling | Philippines | US Time Zone (EST)



Role Summary

We are hiring a sharp, reliable VA to make outbound cold calls using our proven script. Your ONLY job is to book 15-minute discovery calls with service business owners (power washing, window cleaning, HVAC, plumbing, electrical).



We are a US-based service helping local businesses recover missed calls and book more jobs automatically.

We provide the system that automatically captures, qualifies, and books their inbound leads so they stop losing money on missed calls. You simply fill the owner’s discovery calendar so we can close new clients.



What You’ll Do

50–100 dials per day using our exact script

Follow the script structure exactly (natural delivery is expected)

Strictly: Permission ? Problem acknowledgment ? Validation ? Calendar ask

Log everything in GoHighLevel

NO pricing talk, NO demos



Pay Structure 

(Hybrid – Performance + Stability)

$7.00 per hour base pay (paid weekly via Wise/PayPal)

Weeks 1–2 (ramp): $15 per booked discovery call

Week 3+: $25 per discovery call that books AND shows (verified within 48 hrs)

Top performers can earn $1,400+ USD per month (performance-based)

Performance Expectations (after training)

2–4 qualified bookings per 100 dials

0.5–1.5 showed calls per day (steady state)

Minimum 50 dials per day required to remain active



What We Provide

Pre-loaded clean lead lists

Full script + objection handlers

GoHighLevel dialer + recording system

Weekly training & call reviews

Fast weekly payouts

Important Note

This is high-volume cold calling. Expect rejection on most calls.

Requirements (must have)

Strong, clear, neutral English (record a 30-second voice sample reading the script opening — we’ll send it)

Prior sales or call-center experience preferred

Quiet workspace + stable internet

Available during US business hours (Iowa time zone)



Can start immediately



How to Apply (must do all 3)

Record yourself reading the first 30 seconds of our opening script (provided below).

Answer: “How many dials per day are you comfortable making?”

Attach your last 2 weeks of call metrics (or reply “none yet” if new).

Reply with “I’m ready” + your voice sample and we’ll send the full script and test call instructions within 24 hours.



Please see opening script below: 



“Hey, this is [Your Name]. I tried calling earlier but it went to voi
.



Quick question — when you miss calls during the day, do those customers usually end up going with someone else?



That’s exactly what we help fix by following up instantly and booking the job for you.”
salary: $7 per hour base + up to $25/Showed B...

title: Video & Motion Graphics Editor
description:
About Us:

Million Dollar Baby Co. is the parent company behind some of the most beloved nursery and kids' furniture brands including babyletto, daVinci, Namesake, and Nursery Works. We’re known for blending modern design with safety, sustainability, and style—creating beautiful spaces where families grow.



We’re seeking a talented Video & Motion Graphics Editor to help bring our brand stories to life across



What you’ll be doing:



Edit high-quality, on-brand videos for brand campaigns, product launches, digital ads, paid media, and social channels (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Meta)

Design and animate motion graphics for our website, Instagram Reels & TikTok, campaigns, and promotional videos

Collaborate closely with the creative, social, partnerships and brand teams to ideate and execute engaging visual narratives

Organize and manage footage, audio, and design assets for seamless production workflows

Maintain brand consistency across all video and motion projects, while adapting style & tone for each channel or brand

Stay up to date on content trends, editing styles, and platform best practices (especially short-form content)

Occasionally assist in art direction and shoot planning for video-based campaigns

Experience using video asset management software like Dropbox and 

Perform basic audio editing tasks such as noise reduction, level balancing, and syncing dialogue with visuals to ensure high-quality final products

Develop clear, engaging storyboards that visually communicate narrative flow, actions, and scene composition, ensuring alignment with creative direction and project goals.

What You Bring to Bring to Table:



5+ years of experience in video editing and motion graphics, ideally in a consumer or lifestyle brand setting

Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

Experience editing for social-first formats (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Meta ads)

Ability to work within brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries

Excellent storytelling instincts and pacing for both short- and long-form video

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Experience with 3D, , and sound design

Bonus Points If You



Have a great eye for interior design, kids’ lifestyle aesthetics, or fashion-forward visual storytelling

Have experience with product or brand storytelling across DTC and retail

Have worked with parenting, baby, or Gen Z and millennial-focused brands

Why You'll Love Working With Us



Join a creative, high-impact team shaping the future of modern parenting design

Collaborate on trend-forward campaigns seen across global retailers

Competitive salary, benefits, and growth opportunities in a design-led environment

title: Digital Operations & Marketing Specialist
description:
We are a Melbourne-based cabinetry and wardrobes business looking for a sharp, capable digital operator to help us improve our customer communication, marketing systems and automation.



This is a part-time remote role for someone who is strong technically, but who also has good judgment.



We do not want someone who just follows instructions literally. We want someone who can look at an
, form, workflow or page and tell whether it actually makes sense, feels polished, and would land properly with Australian customers.



What you’ll work on

This role will support a mix of digital marketing, CRM and automation work, including:

HubSpot workflow setup, cleanup and optimisation

Customer
 flows and automated communications

Improving the customer journey from enquiry through to installation

Helping create clearer customer sign-off and pre-install communication

Building or refining forms, landing pages and process automations

SEO support including service page improvements, metadata, internal links and content updates

Website content updates and formatting

CRM hygiene, list management and reporting support

Using AI tools well to draft, refine and improve work faster

Reviewing digital touchpoints and flagging things that feel unclear, clunky or off-brand



You should be:

very strong in written English

highly organised and detail-oriented

comfortable with HubSpot and digital tools

able to work independently

thoughtful about wording, presentation and customer experience

someone who cares whether the final output is genuinely good, not just technically complete

You do not need to be an expert in everything, but you do need to be capable, reliable and have strong attention to detail.



Important

We are an Australian customer-facing business, so tone matters. We want someone who can help make sure our
s, workflows, forms and website updates feel clear, polished and appropriate for our market.



This role is best suited to someone who enjoys making things better — not just finishing tasks.



Hours

Part-time. Flexible structure for the right person.



Pay

We are open to paying well for the right person. Please include your expected hourly or monthly rate in your application.



How to apply

Please do not send a generic application.



At the top of your application, write ALMARA.



Then include:



A short intro about you

Which digital tools you have used most

Examples of relevant work in HubSpot,
, SEO, websites or automation

One example of something you improved, not just completed

A short note on why presentation and judgment matter in customer-facing digital work



Please also answer this question:



What is the difference between something being technically correct and being done well?



We are looking for someone thoughtful, reliable and switched on who wants to do high-quality work for the long term.

title: Tech VA — GoHighLevel, Funnel Design & Media Production
description:
About Us

We’re a business coaching company helping personal trainers, nutritionists, and health coaches build profitable online businesses using paid ads and funnel systems. We need a sharp, self-starting tech VA who can own our tech stack and production pipeline without being told what to do next.



The Role

You’ll be the go-to person for building and maintaining funnels, automations, and content production — both for our brand and for our coaching clients. This starts as a part-time role with a clear path to full-time, if you're the right fit. My last assistant was with my for 8 years.

 

You’re welcome to have other clients — we just expect honest time tracking and full transparency, and willing to move to full time and release other clients when working with us. You bill for hours worked, period,



What You’ll Do

GoHighLevel (Primary — ~60% of time)

Build and design funnels, landing pages, sales pages, and thank-you pages in GHL — for us AND our coaching clients

Set up and manage GHL automations/workflows 
 sequences, SMS, triggers, tagging, pipeline management)

Maintain and troubleshoot our GHL accounts

Implement webinar registration flows, order forms, and checkout pages

Clone and customize funnel templates across client accounts



Design (~15% of time)

Create clean, on-brand page designs that don’t look like default templates for me and our clients.

Design social media graphics, thumbnails, and visual assets using Canva or similar tools

Maintain brand consistency across everything you touch (we have a brand guide you’ll follow)



Podcast & YouTube Production (~25% of time)

Edit podcast audio (remove filler, clean up, level audio, add intro/outro) You'll use descript

Upload and optimize YouTube videos (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails, end screens)

Manage the publishing workflow across podcast platforms

Create episode graphics and promotional assets



You MUST Have

Proven GoHighLevel experience (funnels, automations, workflows) — screenshots or portfolio required (If you've never working with GHL before that's fine, but you need to have funnel experience)

Strong design eye — show us pages you’ve built that actually look good

Audio/video editing experience (Descript, CapCut, PremirePro or similar)

Canva proficiency

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for audio work

Fluent written English

Self-starter mentality — you take initiative, not just instructions



Bonus Points For

Experience with Claude Code or AI-assisted development tools

Familiarity with Kajabi, ConvertKit, or Teachable

Experience supporting a coaching or course-based business

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager (even basic)

WordPress or basic HTML/CSS knowledge

Experience with Descript, PremirePro, Capcut



Schedule & Compensation

Part-time to start (15–20 hours/week) with a clear path to full-time

$5–$10 USD/hour depending on experience and skill level



You’re welcome to have other clients during part-time phase — we just require honest, transparent time tracking

Flexible hours, with some overlap in Eastern Time for login approvals

Long-term position — we want someone who grows with us and is willing to go exclusive when the role moves to full-time



How to Apply

Send us:

Send an
 to 
 and show your portfolio and ONE GoHighLevel funnel or page you’ve built that you’re proud of

A link to your portfolio or screenshots of GHL work

One example of audio or video editing you’ve done

Your hourly rate expectation



This Role is NOT a Fit If…

You bill for hours you’re not actively working

You need to be micromanaged to stay productive

title: Senior Photoshop & Quality Control VA (Real Estate Media)
description:
Agentary is a premium real-estate media company. You’ll be our last line of defense on quality: receive photos/video exports from editors, perform expert Photoshop touch-ups, add boundary lines, run a tight QC checklist, and deliver assets to clients on time with zero rework.



What you’ll do



Final-polish real-estate photos (sky swaps, object removal).



Apply boundary lines, straighten & crop, and prepare web/MLS/social variants.



Run a strict QC pass on photos & short-form video covers/thumbnails; flag fixes.



Package and deliver to clients (Drive/Dropbox/MLS portals), naming + metadata correct.



Maintain a same-day turnaround SLA; update our Notion/Trello boards and SOP checklists.



Join daily Zoom stand-up; collaborate with editors and the Ops Admin.



Must-haves



- Advanced Adobe Photoshop (real-estate retouching portfolio required).



- Speed + accuracy: you can complete 40–60 images/day with consistent quality.



- Working English (clear written updates, can speak on Zoom).



- Reliable PC + fast internet (back-up connection preferred).



- Coachable, checklist-driven, obsessed with details.



Nice-to-haves



- Lightroom, Topaz, boundary-line tools, 



- Experience with real-estate media workflows 



Schedule



Core collaboration window: 5:00 a.m. – 1:00 p.m. PHT (aligns with 9:00 a.m. NZT).

If you prefer earlier to match 7:00 a.m. NZT, alternate is 3:00 a.m. – 11:00 a.m. PHT.

title: Digital Marketing VA — Google & Meta Ads | Social Media | Healthcare Clinic (Australia)
description:
We're a healthcare clinic in Northern NSW, Australia providing dental prosthetic services directly to patients — no middlemen, end-to-end care. We're a small, growing team and we're building the systems to scale. You'll be working directly with the business owner, not a manager in a chain.



The Role



We're looking for an experienced Digital Marketing VA to own our paid advertising, social media, and reporting. This isn't a "post and pray" role — we want someone who genuinely understands performance marketing and can bring ideas, not just execute tasks.

You'll work approximately 4–5 hours per day, long-term.





What You'll Do



Manage and optimise Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns (we have live campaigns — you'd be taking ownership)

Plan and schedule social media content across platforms

Update and maintain our website (static HTML — no CMS, basic HTML comfort is a plus)

Build and maintain weekly/monthly performance reports

Bring proactive suggestions — if you see an opportunity or a problem, say so



You're a Great Fit If...



You have 2+ years of hands-on Google Ads and Meta Ads experience (not just boosting posts)

You can read campaign data and make decisions from it

You've worked with healthcare, allied health, or service-based businesses before (a plus, not required)

You're honest about what you know and what you don't

title: AI Marketing Automation Specialist (GHL / HubSpot / AI Agents)
description:
About Digilari Media



Digilari Media is a Brisbane-based digital marketing agency delivering SEO, paid media, marketing automation, and AI-powered growth strategies for clients across Australia and internationally. We are scaling our remote team and have multiple openings for specialists who can design, build, and deploy repeatable AI-driven sales and marketing systems at scale.



If you are a genuine power user of GoHighLevel (GHL) and/or HubSpot, and you are actively building with AI automation tools, we want to hear from you.



ROLES AVAILABLE



We are hiring across several specialisations. Apply even if you only cover one or two areas:



1. GHL & or  HubSpot Automation Builder

Build repeatable lead management pipelines, nurture sequences, CRM workflows, and smart automation inside GoHighLevel and or HubSpot.



2. Conversational AI & Chatbot Specialist

Design and deploy AI chatbots and conversational flows for lead capture, qualification, appointment booking, and customer support across web, SMS, and social.



3. AI Social Media Agent Operator

Configure and manage AI agents that handle content scheduling, social engagement, and audience management.



4. AI Agentic Workflow Builder

Build multi-step autonomous agents across agentic platforms to automate sales, research, and marketing tasks end-to-end.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Working closely with the Australian team, you will:



- Build and maintain scalable marketing automation packages inside GHL and or HubSpot, including pipelines, triggers, tags, and smart lists that can be deployed to new clients fast

- Design and deploy conversational AI chatbots for lead qualification, appointment booking, and sales support

- Configure AI social media management agents to automate content, engagement, and reporting

- Integrate CRM platforms, landing pages, calendars, and third-party tools into seamless automated funnels

- Build and iterate on AI agentic workflows using platforms such as Claude/Anthropic API, n8n, Make, and similar tools

- Document all builds as repeatable SOPs so the team can deploy them independently

- Actively test new AI tools and bring recommendations back to the team



CORE TECH STACK: STRONG KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED



- GoHighLevel (GHL)

- HubSpot

- Conversational AI / chatbot platforms

- n8n / Make (Integromat)

- AI social media management agents

- Zapier / API integrations



AGENTIC AI PLATFORMS: ONE OR MORE PREFERRED



- Anthropic / Claude API

- OpenAI Agents / GPT-4 API

- LangChain / LangGraph

- CrewAI

- Relevance AI

- AgentGPT / AutoGPT or similar



BONUS: VIBE CODING PLATFORMS



Candidates who can work in vibe coding / no-code dev platforms will be fast-tracked:

- Replit

- Lovable

- Base44

- Bolt.new

- Similar rapid prototyping platforms



WHO YOU ARE



- GHL and or  HubSpot are platforms you can teach, not just use

- You think in systems, you build things once so they run forever

- You are genuinely excited about agentic AI and you test new tools proactively

- You communicate clearly in written English, and documentation comes naturally

- You are a self-starter who can manage your own schedule in a remote team

- You have real examples of automation builds, chatbot deployments, or agentic workflows you can show us



CONDITIONS



- Full-time role (40 hours per week), working remotely from your home country

- Overlap with Australian Eastern Time (AEST) preferred

- Competitive salary based on skills and experience

- Long-term position, we are building a team, not filling a contract

- Multiple positions available across different specialisations



HOW TO APPLY



Please include a cover letter in your application with the subject line:

"AI Automation Specialist - [your primary skill]"



Please include:

- A short cover note explaining your background (no templates please)

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A portfolio, GitHub, or examples of automation builds you have created

- A Loom video (2–5 minutes) walking us through a build or workflow you are proud of



Applications without examples of real work will not be progressed.

title: STR Operations & Marketing VA
description:

If you do not have direct STR or Airbnb experience, this role is not the right fit.

This is not an entry-level VA role.

Our properties are designed for:

Getaways

Girls trips

Couples retreats

Strong branding

We do not just manage properties. We build experiences that people book and share.



About the Role

STR operations

Guest communication

Listing optimization

Demand awareness

Marketing execution



You will work directly with the owner and be expected to take ownership, think proactively, and identify opportunities for improvement.



What You’ll Own

Ensure fast, professional, and consistent responses

Handle guest issues, complaints, and resolution professionally

Apply STR SEO and platform ranking best practices

Ensure listings stay competitive and aligned with seasonality



Demand & Market Awareness

Flag pricing, availability, and minimum stay opportunities

Support positioning properties for peak seasons, events, and group stays



New Listing Setup

Assist with launching new properties from start to finish

Build and optimize listings for visibility and conversion

Apply proven STR setup strategies



Light Bookkeeping & Tracking

Track rental income and expenses in spreadsheets

Maintain organized financial records

Support reporting and internal tracking



Marketing 

Social media posting and scheduling

Support content organization and repurposing

Maintain consistency across platforms

Support seasonal campaigns and promotions



Platform Experience (Preferred)

Experience with one or more of the following:

Airbnb | VRBO or 

Google Vacation Rentals

Property management systems such as Hostex, Hostaway, Hospitable

Happy Guest (not required but would need to learn)

HostCo (not required but would need to learn)



What Success Looks Like

Guest communication is fast, professional, and consistent

Listings remain optimized and competitive

No operational details are missed

Properties stay well booked and performing

Guest issues are handled smoothly and confidently

Opportunities for improvement are proactively identified

You help turn operations into a reliable, revenue-generating system.



Requirements

STR Experience

Proven experience working with short-term rentals or Airbnb

Understanding of guest lifecycle, reviews, and booking flow

Familiarity with listing optimization and performance



Operations & Organization

Highly detail-oriented and organized

Able to manage multiple properties and workflows

Strong follow-through and accountability



Communication

Strong written English

Professional and friendly tone

Comfortable handling guest issues independently



Performance Awareness

Understands how pricing, demand, and visibility impact bookings

Able to identify problems and suggest improvements

Thinks beyond tasks and understands outcomes



Tools & Systems

Airbnb, OTAs and STR platforms

Google Workspace

Spreadsheets


 or similar CRM preferred

Social media platforms



Compensation

Month 1 (Training Traill)

$5 to $7 per hour

25 to 30 hours per week



After 30 Days

$800 to $1,000 per month

Full-time at 40 hours per week



 **To Apply - READ below and submit ALL of the following: using this link 



Resume with STR or hospitality experience

Examples of listings or properties you have worked on

Platforms you have used such as Airbnb or VRBO



Interview process:

1) Fill out form

2) Send on pre-interview questions

3) Send us message letting us know you applied and items are complete 

4) Set up Zoom interview 



Pre-interview Questions in a video:

If a listing is not getting bookings, what steps would you take to improve it?

How do you research local demand or events that impact bookings?

Have you helped launch or optimize a listing? Explain your process

How would you prioritize guest messages, a maintenance issue, and updating a listing?



Final Note

This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow beyond basic VA work and become a key part of operations.

If you understand how to manage properties while improving performance and guest experience, we want to hear from you.

title: React Native Developer Needed — Faith-Based Mobile App (1 Week Build, Full Code Provided)
description:
**TITLE:**

React Native Developer Needed — Faith-Based Mobile App (1 Week Build, Full Code Provided)



---



**OVERVIEW:**

We are building a bold, luxury faith-based CHRISTIAN mobile app for iOS and Android. All code is written and provided by an AI system. We need a skilled React Native developer to implement, connect, and deploy the app in 7 days.



This is NOT a design or architecture role. The code is already written. You execute, deploy, and troubleshoot.



---



**WHAT YOU WILL DO:**

- Set up React Native + Expo development environment

- Configure Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Storage, Cloud Messaging)

- Implement all screens from provided code (15+ screens)

- Connect real-time Firestore data listeners

- Integrate payment gateway (TBD — PayPal, 
, or RevenueCat)

- Set up push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging

- Deploy to Vercel (web PWA) and Expo (iOS + Android)

- Submit to Apple App Store and Google Play Store

- Attend daily check-ins and implement feedback same day



---



**TECH STACK:**

- React Native + Expo

- Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Storage, FCM)

- OpenAI API (for AI Prayer Assistant and AI Group Manager)

- Payment gateway (TBD)

- GitHub for version control

- Vercel for web deployment



---



**APP FEATURES:**

- Cinematic onboarding flow (5 screens with animations)

- Home Feed with live streams, posts, videos, exclusive content

- Small Groups with real-time chat and AI Group Manager

- Events page with countdown timers

- Rhapsody of Realities interactive flipbook

- Store with merch + digital products

- Prayer Request page with AI assistant

- Referral system with badge progression

- Push notifications

- Full user profiles with badges and stats

- Admin content management



---



**REQUIREMENTS:**

- 2+ years React Native experience

- Strong Firebase experience (Auth, Firestore, FCM)

- Experience submitting apps to App Store and Google Play

- Available to start IMMEDIATELY

- Available 4-5 hours per day for 7 days

- Strong English communication

- Must be comfortable working from detailed AI-generated code

- Bonus: Experience with Expo EAS Build



---



**TIMELINE:**

Day 1 — Environment setup + project scaffold

Day 2 — Onboarding + Authentication

Day 3 — Home Feed + Profile

Day 4 — Small Groups + Events

Day 5 — Store + Payments

Day 6 — AI Features + Push Notifications

Day 7 — Polish + App Store Submission



**Deadline: 7 days from start date**



---



**BUDGET:**

$200 — $1,000 fixed price (based on experience)

Milestone payments: 25% on Day 1, 50% on Day 4, 25% on delivery



---



**TO APPLY — answer these 3 questions:**

1. Have you submitted an app to the Apple App Store before? Share the app name.

2. Describe your Firebase experience in one paragraph.

3. What is your earliest available start date?



Applications without answers to all 3 questions will not be considered.



---



This is a Kingdom project. We are building the #1 faith-based app in the world. If you are skilled, fast, and available now — apply immediately.

title: Short-Form AI Video Editor — HeyGen, CapCut, Higgsfield, Veo 3
description:
I run a fast-growing
 health and wellness page with over 939,000 followers built around a AI avatar, plus a network of additional AI avatar pages. I am looking for an experienced short-form video editor who already knows how to use HeyGen, CapCut, Higgsfield, and Veo 3 and can produce high-quality content from day one with minimal direction.



This is not a training role. You must already know how to use the following tools:



HeyGen — generating talking head videos using AI avatars, setting voice and avatar settings, exporting clean vertical video

Higgsfield — generating hyper-realistic AI images from written prompts, maintaining consistent character appearance across generations

Veo 3 — generating high-quality AI video content from prompts

CapCut — editing short-form vertical videos with text overlays, font styling, music syncing, color grading, and precise pacing. You can look at a reference video and replicate the editing style exactly



What the daily workflow looks like:

You receive a plain text script fro
. You handle everything from there — Higgsfield image generation, HeyGen video creation, Veo 3 where applicable, and CapCut editing — and deliver a minimum of 10 finished videos per day ready to post. The process is fast and repeatable once you know the style.



What I need from you:

Proven hands-on experience with HeyGen, Higgsfield, Veo 3, and CapCut — please include examples of your work

Ability to match an existing editing style precisely without being told every detail

High output capacity — 10+ videos per day, 7 days a week

Reliable, fast, and communicative

title: Senior AI Agent Engineer (LLM Systems & Autonomous Agents)
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced AI engineer specializing in the design, development, and deployment of LLM-based agents and autonomous AI systems.

This role is not focused on web development, SEO, UI, or general software engineering. It is a deeply technical position for engineers whose core expertise is AI agents, reasoning systems, and large language model orchestration.



Role Overview

You will design and build production-grade AI agents capable of executing complex tasks with minimal supervision. This includes single-agent and multi-agent systems with structured reasoning, memory, tool use, and robust failure handling.



Key Responsibilities

Architect and implement LLM-driven autonomous agents

Build multi-agent systems with coordination, delegation, and feedback loops

Design structured reasoning pipelines (planning, execution, reflection)

Implement long-term and short-ter
mory mechanisms

Integrate tool calling, function execution, and external APIs

Develop Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using vector databases

Debug and mitigate hallucinations, looping behaviors, and reasoning failures

Optimize systems for reliability, latency, cost, and scalability



Required Technical Expertise

Advanced Python engineering (clean, modular, production-ready code)

Deep hands-on experience with OpenAI / GPT-4 / GPT-4.1 / o-series models

Strong understanding of LLM prompting at a system and architectural level

Practical experience with agent frameworks, such as:

LangChain / LangGraph

AutoGen

CrewAI



or equivalent custom implementations



Expertise in embeddings, semantic search, and vector databases:



Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS, Chroma, or similar



Experience designing and evaluating RAG pipelines



Familiarity with LLM evaluation, observability, and agent debugging



Strongly Preferred Qualifications



Experience deploying AI agents in real-world or production environments



Ability to reason about failure modes, edge cases, and system behavior



Comfort designing AI architectures without reliance on templates or tutorials



Strong understanding of LLM limitations and trade-offs



Ability to clearly explain technical decisions and system designs



What This Role Is Not



Not web development (frontend or backend)



Not SEO, marketing, or automation scripting



Not prompt-only experimentation



Not entry-level or exploratory AI work



Application Requirements



Applicants should submit:



A summary of AI agents or LLM systems they have built



Relevant code samples, repositories, or architecture diagrams



A brief explanation of a challenging AI system problem they encountered and how they solved it

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: B2B Appointment Setter — Digital Marketing (Australian Market)
description:
About Digilari Media



Digilari Media is a Brisbane-based digital marketing agency and an accredited partner of Google and active users on GHL and HubSpot. We help Australian & NZ businesses grow through SEO, Google Ads, inbound marketing, social media, and marketing automation. We are expanding our outbound sales team and looking for experienced, confident B2B appointment setters who can open conversations, handle objections on the fly, and consistently book qualified meetings for our Australian sales consultants.



This is a high-activity role that rewards people who are disciplined, articulate, and genuinely motivated by results. If you need hand-holding on every call or you shut down at the first objection, this role is not for you.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY



- Make 75–100 outbound calls to Australian businesses, targeting key decision-makers

- Aim for 20–30 meaningful conversations per day with business owners, marketing managers, and senior leaders

- Use provided scripts and objection-handling guides as a foundation, then adapt in real time based on the conversation

- Book qualified appointments directly into the calendars of our Australian sales consultants

- Log all call activity, outcomes, and notes accurately into our CRM after every session

- Send follow-up and information
s to prospects who need more detail before committing to a meeting

- Complete a daily activity report covering calls made, conversations held, and appointments set



YOUR DAILY TARGETS



- 75–100 outbound calls per day

- 20–30 conversations with decision-makers

- 5-10 qualified appointments booked weekly 

- CRM updated after every call

- Daily activity report submitted



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Proven experience in outbound B2B calling, appointment setting, or telephone sales, ideally 2 or more years

- Excellent spoken and written English with a clear, confident, and professional approach on every call

- Ability to work autonomously with a high degree of initiative, you do not wait to be told what to do

- Genuine resilience, you handle rejection professionally and keep dialling

- Strong listening skills, you ask good questions and know when to adapt mid-call

- Basic familiarity with digital marketing concepts (SEO, Google Ads, social media, marketing automation) you do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable discussing these services at a high level

- Experience logging calls and managing follow-ups in a CRM (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, or similar)

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home working environment



WHAT DIGILARI PROVIDES



- Detailed call scripts and proven objection rebuttals, you will not be starting from scratch

- Full onboarding and ongoing coaching from our sales leadership team

- CRM access, calling tools, and all the systems you need to do the job well

- Clear KPIs so you always know exactly where you stand and what you are working toward



COMPENSATION



Competitive hourly base rate, plus a per-appointment bonus for every qualified meeting booked. Additional performance bonuses are tied to volume milestones and actual signed clients. The harder you work and the better you perform, the more you earn, uncapped.



WORKING CONDITIONS



- Full-time, Monday to Friday

- Hours aligned to Australian Eastern Time (AEST), you will be calling Australian businesses during their business day

- 100% remote from the Philippines



HOW TO APPLY



Include a cover letter with the subject line:

"Appointment Setter Application — [your name]"



Please include:

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short note on your outbound calling background: what you were selling, how many calls per day, and the results you achieved

- A 2–3 minute Loom video or voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are right for this role



Applications without evidence of prior outbound calling experience will not be progressed.

title: Civil Engineer
description:
Responsible for planning, designing, and overseeing construction projects to ensure they are completed safely and on time.

Do estimation cost, have knowledge in purchasing, importing materials and must be able to work aboard. Start ASAP.



Core Responsibilities: 

Design and Planning: Civil engineers create detailed designs for infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, buildings, dams, airports, tunnels, and water supply systems. They conduct feasibility studies, analyze materials, costs, and environmental impacts, and ensure structural integrity and safety standards are met. 



Project Management: They oversee the entire lifecycle of a project, including budgeting, scheduling, procurement, and resource allocation. Civil engineers coordinate with contractors, architects, urban planners, and regulatory agencies to ensure projects are completed on time and within budget. 



Construction Supervision: Civil engineers monitor construction sites to ensure work adheres to design specifications, quality standards, and safety regulations. They provide technical guidance, resolve on-site issues, and supervise construction teams. 



Site Investigation: Before construction, civil engineers assess geological and environmental conditions, including soil composition, water tables, and potential hazards, to determine site suitability. 



Regulatory Compliance: Ensure projects comply with local, state, and federal regulations, environmental guidelines, and health and safety requirements. 



Technical and Software Skills: Civil engineers use computer-aided design (CAD) software, such as AutoCAD Civil 3D, for designing infrastructure frameworks. They also prepare technical reports, bid proposals, and environmental impact statements.



Resource and Quality Management: They schedule material and equipment deliveries, manage labor allocation, and oversee the quality of construction materials to ensure durability and sustainability. 



Additional Duties:

Conducting risk assessments and providing creative solutions for construction challenges. 



Preparing plan and profile drawings, grading plans, utility plans, and roadway plans. 



Engaging in ongoing professional development to stay current with engineering advancements.

title: Systems Analyst
description:
I’m looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Systems Analyst to support the day-to-day administration, maintenance, and development of our core business systems. These systems support property management, accounting, budgeting, and data management functions. This role will focus on providing systems support and training while also identifying opportunities to enhance and streamline business processes and workflows.



Primary Responsibilities:



- Address Yardi support tickets and inquiries through our IT ticketing system (GoGenuity)

- Organize, maintain, and troubleshoot core business applications, including application servers, hardware, endpoints, databases, and advanced technical issues

- Work closely with me and the management team to develop and improve processes, procedures, automations, and workflows across departments

- Research and test new software versions, plugins, and system customizations

- Support third-party integrations with Yardi platforms (e.g., budgeting tools, utility billback programs, resident screening providers)

- Assist in conducting systems training sessions through one-on-one sessions, group instruction, demonstrations, and workshops

- Complete systems-related tasks for onboarding and offboarding properties (acquisitions, transfers, or sales)

- Ensure databases comply with data governance policies, with a strong focus on protecting PII

- Modify and create reports using Yardi tools (SSRS, YSR, Custom Financial Analytics) to meet business needs

- Work with Yardi support to maintain the database and its modules supporting property management, accounting, compliance, and reporting

- Contribute to project planning, implementation of new systems or enhancements, and tracking of approved initiatives



Other Duties:



- Support me and the management team with additional tasks as needed

- Ensure compliance with company policies and applicable federal and local regulations

- Attend meetings and collaborate with tea
mbers to share best practices



Qualifications:



- Advanced knowledge of Yardi Voyager 7s, including its modules and backend functionality ** MUST HAVE

- 4–6 years of experience in information technology and systems analysis

- Strong foundational computer skills, including Outlook and Microsoft Office

- Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel

- Experience designing and building enterprise-level systems

- Strong background in large-scale data and integration projects

- Expertise in data integration, data modeling, data warehousing, business intelligence, SSIS, and cubes

- Experience with query tuning, scripting, and program tracing

- Familiarity with programming languages (e.g., JavaScript, Python) is a plus

- Strong analytical, technical, and problem-solving skills

- Excellent organizational and time management abilities

- Proven ability to translate business needs into effective system solutions

- Strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills

- Positive attitude with strong attention to detail and follow-through



Work Schedule:

- Full-time, 40 hours per week



Apply here:

title: Account Manager
description:
I’m looking for a detail-oriented and service-driven Account Manager role where I can support the day-to-day servicing of employee benefit accounts. I enjoy working closely with senior tea
mbers and handling client communication, account maintenance, renewals, reporting, and issue resolution—especially in a fast-paced environment.



What you can do:



- Manage the day-to-day servicing of assigned health insurance and employee benefit accounts

- Process employee benefit transactions such as new enrollments, terminations, policy changes, ID cards, and renewals

- Set up and manage groups in Employee Navigator, including reviewing new hire reports and submitting enrollment/change forms

- Prepare, submit, and track employee applications, change forms, and insurance-related documentation

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records and documentation

- Support renewal analysis, quotes, and administrative tasks alongside senior tea
mbers

- Run benefit quotes and assist with renewal preparation

- Handle claims inquiries, billing discrepancies, and carrier-related concerns

- Pull payroll health deduction reports and notify administrators accordingly

- Communicate clearly and professionally with clients, carriers, and internal teams via phone and

- Ensure timely and accurate processing of benefit changes based on procedures and carrier requirements

- Adapt quickly to new systems, platforms, and shifting priorities



What you bring:



- Hands-on experience with Employee Navigator - MUST HAVE REQUIREMENT

- 2+ years of experience in the health insurance industry

- 2+ years of customer service experience in a client-facing or professional setting

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Outlook, and Word

- Solid understanding of insurance plans and benefit summaries

- Strong attention to detail, organization, and time management

- Ability to multitask, prioritize, and meet deadlines

- Comfort working with numbers and benefit-related calculations

- A proactive, solution-oriented mindset and ability to learn quickly

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Open to a full-time remote role (40 hours/week), Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 5 PM PST, and ready to jump in and contribute right away.



Apply here:

title: Etsy + Shopify Product Lister & AI Mockup Creator (Full-Time, $3.50 - $4.50/hr, Long-Term)
description:

You will help take draft products and turn them into high-converting live listings using our templates, systems, and AI tools.



You will be working across the following brands:



* Etsy Shops:

TJtoddles (personalized baby and family gift products)

Olympia Bay (home decor)

MiraMella (wedding signage)

LeftRightUSA (apparel)

* Shopify Stores:







We are an established business with consistent monthly sales and are looking for someone long-term who wants stability, growth, and to be part of a structured system.



* Your Responsibilities

Create and publish product listings on Etsy and Shopify

Turn draft products into clean, professional listings

Generate realistic lifestyle mockups using AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Canva, etc.)

Upload images, variations, pricing, and product details

Follow structured templates for descriptions and product setup

Maintain consistent branding across all stores

Organize product assets and files



* Requirements

Experience with Etsy OR Shopify product listing (both is a plus)

Experience with Canva or similar tools

Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow systems and templates exactly

Reliable internet and full-time availability



* Bonus (preferred):

Experience with both Etsy AND Shopify

Print-on-Demand product experience

Basic understanding of product SEO



* Pay & Schedule

$3.50 - $4.50/hour

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Long-term position

Performance-based raises and promotion opportunities

Answer:

title: E-Commerce Customer Service Representative
description:
Be the Reason Someone’s Day Gets Better – WFH CSR Role (PH-Based Only)



From answering questions to solving concerns, your support makes a real impact. Start a fulfilling work-from-home career where empathy and excellence go hand in hand—no commute, no traffic, just more time for what matters.

• Provide customer support via phone, chat, and

• Stay up to date on products, resources, and team guidelines

title: Sales Closer (Warm Leads – No Cold Calling)
description:
Join Our Team as a Sales Closer



Are you a high-energy sales professional who thrives on closing deals? We’re looking for a motivated Sales Closer to join our team and convert warm, inbound leads into customers—no cold calling required.



How to Apply

Send us a 1-minute audio or video introduction sharing who you are and your relevant sales experience.

What We’re Looking For

Fluent in spoken and written English

Strong closing skills and confidence on calls

Consistent, reliable, and results-driven

Stable internet connection

Team player with a positive attitude



Available to work Monday–Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (EST) with a 1-hour break



What You’ll Get

$1,000/month base salary + commission based on performance ($500–$3,000)

Paid sick leave and vacation leave

Payments twice per month (1st and 16th)

100% remote work environment

Annual tea
etups in the Philippines

A supportive, growth-focused company culture



Why This Role Is Different

We offer a non-toxic, respectful work environment where performance is rewarded and growth is encouraged. You’ll be working with warm leads, selling high-ticket items (shipping containers), and earning strong incentives based on your results.



This role is perfect for someone who is:

Competitive and driven to exceed targets

Energetic and engaging on calls throughout the day

Hungry for commissions and growth



Important

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. This is not a temporary position or a side job. If you're looking for short-term work or plan to juggle multiple jobs, this role is not the right fit.
