title: Shopify Store Builder (Multi-Channel Inventory System – Books / Amazon Integration
description:
We are looking for a high-level Shopify builder to create a store designed to handle large-scale, single-quantity inventory synced across multiple marketplaces.



This is NOT a basic Shopify design role.



You will be building the foundation for a system that connects Amazon, eBay, and other marketplaces where each product has a quantity of 1 and must remain perfectly synced to avoid overselling.



---



**Scope of Work**



* Build a clean, high-converting Shopify storefront (theme selection + customization)

* Structure product pages for large catalog ingestion (thousands of SKUs)

* Import and organize existing Amazon inventory into Shopify

* Implement a system for ongoing product uploads

* Integrate Shopify with multi-channel inventory software (ex: Monsoon, Sellbrite, or similar)

* Ensure inventory syncing logic is properly configured (1 sale = removed everywhere)

* Set up collections, navigation, and search for large book catalog

* Optimize site speed and performance under large SKU load

* Ensure mobile-first usability



---



**Key Objective**



Build a system that can handle continuous daily inventory uploads and maintain accurate stock levels across all platforms.



If the system breaks, we lose money.

Accuracy > design.



---



**Requirements**



* Proven experience building Shopify stores with large product catalogs (1,000+ SKUs)

* Experience integrating Shopify with Amazon and/or multi-channel inventory systems

* Strong understanding of SKU structure and inventory syncing logic

* Experience with bulk product imports (CSV or API-based)

* Ability to think in systems, not just design

* Strong attention to detail (inventory errors are unacceptable)



---



**Preferred (Not Required but Valuable)**



* Experience with books / media inventory

* Familiarity with AbeBooks or similar marketplaces

* Experience with tools like Monsoon, Sellbrite, or LitCommerce

* Understanding of Amazon Seller Central workflows



---



**Timeline**



* Initial build: 2–3 weeks

* Potential for ongoing work based on performance



---



**To Apply**



Include the following:



1. Links to Shopify stores you’ve built (must include large catalogs)

2. Brief explanation of how you would structure inventory syncing across multiple platforms

3. What systems/tools you’ve used for multi-channel inventory management

4. Your approach to preventing overselling with single-quantity products



Applications without this information will not be considered.



---



We are not looking for someone to “try this out.”

We are looking for someone who has done this before and can execute without supervision.

title: Paid Ads Specialist - Meta
description:
We're a growing business with an existing audience of over 600,000 contacts - and we're ready to scale. We're looking for a skilled paid ads specialist who can turn that reach into real results on Meta 
/Instagram). If you know how to drive ROAS and you're hungry to grow with a business that rewards performance, this role is for you.



What you'll be doing:



- Set up, manage, and optimise paid campaigns across Meta - working with our large existing contact base of 600,000+

- Monitor performance daily and send clear, regular reports on key metrics

- Continuously test and refine targeting, creatives, and budgets to improve ROI

- Bring ideas - we're open to what works, and we reward people who take initiative



What we're looking for:



- Proven, hands-on experience running Meta and TikTok ad campaigns

- Confident reading and acting on ad metrics — ROAS, CTR, CPC, CPM, conversion rates

- Self-motivated and able to work independently without hand-holding

- Reliable internet and available during agreed hours

- Portfolio or proof of past campaigns — this is a must



Compensation & growth: 



- Starting salary: $200/month (month one only - to verify your work style and results)

- Performance target: $500/month

- Bonuses available based on results

- Salary increases are based on performance, not time served - top performers get there fast



To apply: Send your resume and examples of ad campaigns you've managed. Show us the numbers - we want to see what you've actually achieved, not just what you've worked on.

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.



Preferred Backgrounds  

Candidates with prior experience in the following sectors will be given priority consideration:



Government or public administration



Law firms or legal advisory institutions



Media or strategic communications organizations



Think tanks or research institutions



Consulting or public relations firms



Non-governmental or international organizations

We offer competitive compensation packages and flexible work arrangements tailored to global professionals.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.





=========

If you are remotely interested after reading the above, click here for next step: 
/document/d/1fPIFvrq33y5RsXemzS8TFbiUQ9bCDOKY4YNDyjo8L2w/edit?usp=sharing

title: Fighting Game YouTube Video Editor
description:
BROAD SCOPE

We are hiring a Video Editor for a single gig. You will receive one raw gameplay recording of a fighting game session (similar to a Twitch VOD) and a written brief. You will edit this into one finished YouTube video (10–30 minutes). You will cut dead air, add text overlays and basic motion graphics, mix audio, and deliver a finished export. If the work is strong, there may be future gigs.



OVERVIEW & DETAILS

This is for a YouTube channel focused on the fighting game community (FGC). The content is a personal improvement series documenting the process of getting better at competitive fighting games — getting coached, trying new characters, analyzing pro players, and grinding ranked. The audience is FGC players and fans who want to watch someone go through the improvement journey and learn alongside them.



Games currently covered:

-   Street Fighter 6

-   Tekken 8

-   2XKO



Types of raw footage you may receive:

-   Ranked sets with live commentary

-   Coaching sessions with a coach on call

-   Character lab sessions testing combos, setups, or matchups

-   VOD review / pro player analysis with voiceover

Each recording comes with a written brief. You will not need to guess what the video is about.



CORE OBJECTIVES

-   You are editing one raw gameplay recording into one finished YouTube video (10–30 minutes).

-   You are cutting the footage so the pacing holds a viewer’s attention for the full video length.

-   You are adding text overlays, lower thirds, transitions, and basic motion graphics as specified in the brief provided.



EXPANDED OBJECTIVES

-   Editing & Delivery

    -   You will receive the raw file via Google Drive along with a written brief.

    -   Review the full footage and identify the key 
nts: breakthroughs, clutch plays, coaching corrections, tough losses worth learning from.

    -   Deliver a finished export in the correct format.

    -   Measured by: final video delivered on time, matches the brief provided.

-   Pacing & Structure

    -   Cut all dead air, queue time, and downtime.

    -   Build a narrative structure: setup, struggle, learning 
nt, payoff.

    -   Balance game audio against commentary or voiceover.

    -   You need to understand fighting games well enough to know which 
nts matter and why a viewer should care.

    -   Measured by: pacing quality in the delivered edit, no unnecessary dead spots.

-   Overlays & Graphics

    -   Add text overlays as specified in the brief: character names, move names, rank displays, notation.

    -   Add lower thirds, transitions, and basic motion graphics.

    -   Follow the brief and any brand references provided.

    -   Measured by: overlays match the brief, clean execution, revision count.



REQUIREMENTS

-   Required: You understand the fighting game space and can prove it. You know Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, and 2XKO. You follow the FGC. You can tell the difference between a hype 
nt and dead air in a ranked set. If you do not actively engage with fighting games, do not apply.

-   Required: You know how to edit long-form content for YouTube. You understand pacing, retention, and how editing decisions affect whether someone watches for 2 minutes or 20.

-   Ideal: Your past work includes fighting game or esports content specifically.

-   Ideal: You actively play Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, or other competitive fighting games at a ranked level.

-   Ideal: Experience with After Effects or motion graphics.

-   Ideal: Familiarity with YouTube Analytics and audience retention data.

-   Ideal: Experience editing coaching or educational gaming content, not just montages.



HOW TO APPLY

 your application to 
 with the subject line: [Video Editor Gig] Your Name



Sample VOD:





Brief:

This is a 6-hour ranked session in Tekken 8. I was grinding to Tekken God rank. This is for a YouTube channel that documents the process of improving at fighting games. Find 3 
nts from this VOD that you would use in a 60–90 second YouTube clip and tell me why. Then edit those 
nts into the clip.



Specific instructions for the edit:

-   The clip must open with gameplay, not with queue time or character select.

-   Include at least one 
nt where I lose and show why it matters.

-   Use a text overlay to show the character name and rank at the start of the clip.



Beyond the above, use your judgment on pacing and cuts.



Your application must include both of the following. Applications that are missing either item or do not follow these exact instructions will not be reviewed.



1. A test edit from the VOD.

Edit the footage into a 60–90 second YouTube-ready clip based on the brief above. Follow the specific instructions. Beyond those, use your own judgment on pacing and cuts. Upload your finished edit to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



2. A Google Sheet explaining your choices.

Create a Google Sheet with exactly these column headers:

-   Game Title

-   Clip Timestamp (Start)

-   Clip Timestamp (End)

-   What Happens

-   Why This 
nt Matters for the Final Video



For each 
nt you used in your test edit, fill in the timestamp range, describe what happens, and explain in 1–2 sentences why you chose this 
nt for the final edit.



The first cell in your Google Sheet (A1) must contain the word “Hansei.”



Share the Google Sheet link in your application. Make sure the link is set to “Anyone with the link can view.”



Applications that do not follow every instruction above will not be considered.



If your application passes, you will be offered a paid gig to edit the full VOD into a finished 10–30 minute YouTube video.

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper (Investment Entities)
description:
We’re are a growing investment firm looking for a sharp, detail-oriented bookkeeper to support approximately 10-15 investment entities. This is a part-time role with consistent work during standard business hours.



This is not high-volume bookkeeping, but it does require someone who understands investment-related accounting and can work independently without hand-holding.



What You’ll Be Doing:



* Record and reconcile transactions across multiple investment entities

* Review and interpret escrow statements and properly book related journal entries

* Track and record capital contributions, distributions, and capital investments

* Account for investment income and capital gains transactions

* Perform monthly bank and account reconciliations

* Maintain clean, accurate financial records

* Build workpapers and processes to support all entries



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong understanding of basic accounting principles

* Experience with investment accounting (capital accounts, gains, distributions, etc.)

* Ability to read and interpret escrow statements with confidence

* Comfortable booking journal entries without needing step-by-step guidance

* Highly detail-oriented and organized

* Able to work during business hours (generally 8am–4pm EST)



Additional Details:



* Part-time role with steady, predictable work

* Low overall transaction volume, but accuracy is critical

* Include a link to your resume to be considered



If you’ve worked with investment entities and know your way around escrow statements, this will be a good fit.

title: Fiction Manuscript Editor / Reader (Part-Time | Remote | Philippines)
description:
About the Role



PRISM AI Consultants is expanding its book publishing pipeline and is looking for detail-oriented Fiction Manuscript Editors/Readers to help evaluate and improve manuscripts before publication.



This is a reading + feedback role — not rewriting. Your ability to analyze story quality, flow, and clarity is what matters most.



Work Details

Hours: 10–15 hours per week (starting at 10)

Rate: $5/hour

Start Date: Immediate

Location: Remote (Philippines only)

Commitment: Long-term opportunity for strong performers



What You’ll Be Doing

-Read full fiction manuscripts (60,000–80,000 words)

-Use a structured checklist to identify:

-Awkward phrasing

-Plot inconsistencies

-Repetitive language

-Robotic or unnatural passages

-Pacing issues

-Dialogue that doesn’t sound natural

-Use ElevenLabs Reader (text-to-speech) to listen while reading and catch rhythm issues

-Provide clear, structured written feedback (not vague opinions)

-Submit a marked-up document with detailed notes

-Turnaround: 1 manuscript every 2 weeks



? Requirements

-Strong English reading comprehension (near-native level required)

-Experience reading fiction (thriller, horror, romance, sci-fi, literary fiction)

-Comfortable with mature themes (violence, romance, dark topics)

-Ability to give specific, actionable feedback

-Reliable internet and ability to attend weekly check-ins



This Role Is NOT For You If:

-You only give general feedback like “it’s good” or “I like it”

-You struggle to explain why something works or doesn’t

-You are not comfortable reading long-form content regularly



Screening Process (IMPORTANT)

We are looking for quality, not volume.

Step 1: Apply with your experience + favorite fiction genres

Step 2: Top 3 candidates will:

    Read a 5,000-word sample chapter

    Submit structured feedback using our checklist



 We will select the candidate who provides the most insightful, specific, and useful feedback



Why Join PRISM?

-Work directly with a growing publishing pipeline

-Consistent manuscript flow for top performers

-Opportunity to grow into larger editorial roles

-Be part of a team focused on quality, clarity, and execution





 How to Apply

-Include the following in your application:

-Your experience with fiction reading/editing

-Your top 3 favorite fiction genres

-A short paragraph explaining how you give feedback on writing

description:

Position Overview



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, discreet, and proactive Online Dating Manager to oversee and optimize multiple online dating profiles across several platforms. The goal of this role is to streamline the dating process, improve match quality, and ensure consistent alignment with clearly defined relationship preferences and standards.



This individual will act as a digital concierge for online dating activity, managing profile performance, curating matches, and presenting weekly shortlists of high-quality potential partners.



Key Responsibilities:

Profile Management

Create, optimize, and continuously improve 4–5 online dating profiles across major platforms

Ensure all profiles are consistent, engaging, and accurately reflect desired personality and relationship goals

Regularly update photos, bios, prompts, and interests to maximize match quality and response rates

Maintain profile activity to increase visibility and algorithm performance



Matchmaking & Engagement:

Swipe, browse, and actively engage with potential matches on behalf of the client

Strictly adhere to predefined criteria for ideal partner selection (values, lifestyle, age range, goals, etc.)

Filter out non-matching candidates early and efficiently

Initiate and manage first-stage conversations when appropriate, following strict communication guidelines



Location & Market Strategy:

Strategically adjust and test location settings across two designated states to maximize access to high-quality matches

Analyze which locations yield the best match outcomes and refine strategy accordingly



Candidate Curation & Reporting:

Compile a weekly PowerPoint presentation featuring top potential matches

Include photos, bios, compatibility notes, and key insights

Provide a short rationale for why each candidate aligns with the desired criteria

Rank or categorize candidates by match strength or priority level

Highlight any standout or exceptional individuals



Creative Sourcing & Optimization:

Proactively identify and implement additional strategies for finding high-quality matches, including:

Optimizing profile prompts, bios, and photo sequencing for improved engagement and match rates

Identifying and testing niche or alternative dating platforms that may yield higher-quality or more compatible candidates

Monitoring trends in dating app algorithms and adjusting strategy accordingly

Refining filtering criteria over time based on real-world match data and outcomes

Exploring interest-based communities, events, or networks that align with desired partner traits

Contacting and coordinating with professional matchmakers or concierge dating services to expand sourcing channels

Creating and managing a supporting TikTok (or similar social media) presence designed to increase visibility, attract aligned candidates, and generate inbound interest

Suggesting new or unconventional sourcing strategies to continuously improve match quality and efficiency



****NOTE- IF YOU FIND MY FUTURE PARTNER AND WE GET MARRIED, YOU WILL GET A $1000 COMMISSION**

title: VA- KDP Publishing Operations & Launch
description:
About This Role

Hill Country Publishing LLC is an independent publishing company producing non-fiction, self-help, business, and lifestyle titles across multiple genres and pen names. The catalog is actively growing with a structured launch sequence — multiple titles in production at any given time, spanning different audiences and subject areas.

This role exists to handle the operational layer of the publishing business: coordinating ARC (Advance Reader Copy) outreach, managing the review pipeline, executing launch tasks across Amazon KDP, and transitioning into ongoing market research as the catalog expands. The work is detail-oriented, process-driven, and genuinely important — reviews and launch execution are the primary levers that determine whether a self-published book succeeds or disappears.

This is a part-time role to start. For the right person who executes well, it grows into a long-term position with expanding responsibility across a growing multi-genre catalog.







How the Role Is Structured

The position has two distinct phases. The first six months are focused almost entirely on launching the current titles in the pipeline successfully. Once those launches are complete and generating reviews, the role transitions toward research and infrastructure for future titles across multiple genres.



Phase One

Launch & Reviews

Months 1–6





ARC Outreach and Coordination

•  Research and build a targeted list of ARC reviewers relevant to each title’s genre and audience — drawing from book communities on TikTok, Instagram, Goodreads, and genre-specific blogs

•  Identify 50–100 micro-influencers per title using genre-appropriate hashtags and community searches, targeting accounts with follower counts between 5K–50K and high engagement rates relative to their audience size

•  Find contact information (DM handles,
 addresses listed in bios, contact forms) and build a tracking spreadsheet with columns for platform, handle, follower count, engagement notes, contact date, response status, and copy sent

•  Send outreach messages using approved templates — all copy is pre-written and approved before sending; your job is accurate execution and tracking

•  Follow up once per contact, two weeks after initial outreach, using the approved follow-up template

•  Track all responses, log who is interested, coordinate digital copy delivery via BookFunnel or NetGalley (setup guidance provided), and update the tracker daily



Review Pipeline Management

•  Monitor Amazon reviews for both books daily and log all new reviews with date, star rating, and key content in the tracking sheet

•  Flag reviews that may warrant an author response (positive reviews worth acknowledging, critical reviews that contain factual errors) for author approval before any response is drafted

•  Track Goodreads reviews and ratings separately from Amazon

•  Send a weekly review summary every Monday with total review count, star rating average, notable new reviews, and any flagged items requiring attention

•  Monitor for verified vs. unverified purchase status on Amazon reviews and flag any patterns that look like policy violations for the author to assess



KDP Launch Execution

•  Manage the pre-launch checklist for each title: verify book description is live, confirm A+ Content is approved, check that all seven keyword fields are populated, confirm category selections are correct, and verify pricing is set correctly across all formats

•  Coordinate the $0.99 launch pricing window — set the price change date, confirm it goes live, and flag when it’s time to move to the next pricing tier per the approved schedule

•  Monitor Amazon Best Seller Rank (BSR) daily during launch week and log rankings in the tracking sheet every morning

•  Check that all book formats (ebook and paperback) are properly linked on the Amazon product page

•  Submit A+ Content updates when new material is provided by the author



Influencer and Community Outreach Tracking

•  Monitor for TikTok and Instagram posts mentioning the books or the author name and log any organic mentions in the outreach tracker

•  Screenshot and save any social media content featuring the books for the author’s records

•  Research and maintain a running list of BookTok creators, genre-specific influencers, and community figures who would be appropriate for outreach as new titles launch across different categories



Phase Two

Research & Catalog Growth

Months 6+





Niche and Market Research

•  Use Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, and Amazon’s own search to identify keyword opportunities across the genres and categories in Hill Country Publishing’s active catalog

•  Monitor the top 20 competing titles in the primary categories monthly: track their review counts, BSR trends, pricing changes, and any new entrants worth flagging

•  Identify underserved niches across multiple genres — topics with demonstrated search demand, low competition, and weak existing titles — and surface them for the publisher’s consideration

•  Research content ideas for future books by monitoring what questions, topics, and pain points generate engagement in relevant Reddit communities, Goodreads groups, TikTok comment sections, and genre-specific online communities

•  Compile a monthly niche research report in a standard format (template provided) summarizing the top opportunities, notable competitor activity, and suggested focus areas for the author’s consideration



Ongoing Catalog Maintenance

•  Maintain a master spreadsheet tracking all published titles with current BSR, review count, star average, pricing, and active promotional status updated weekly

•  Flag titles whose rankings are declining significantly for the author’s attention

•  Research and shortlist Amazon Advertising keyword opportunities for the author to review and approve before any ads are created or modified

•  Coordinate ARC outreach for new titles as they enter the launch pipeline, using the established process from Phase One







What We’re Looking For

The most important qualities for this role are attention to detail, reliable follow-through, and clear communication. The tasks are well-defined and process-driven — what matters is executing them accurately and consistently, flagging issues when they arise, and never leaving the author wondering what’s happening.



Required

•  Prior experience with Amazon KDP — you understand the dashboard, know what BSR means, and have helped authors or publishers manage titles before

•  Experience with influencer or ARC outreach — you’ve built contact lists, sent templated outreach, and managed response tracking in a spreadsheet

•  Strong English written communication — outreach messages represent the author’s brand; grammar, tone, and professionalism matter

•  Reliable daily availability during the launch phase — launch weeks require morning check-ins and same-day updates, not 48-hour response windows

•  Proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel — you build clean, well-organized trackers and maintain them consistently



Preferred

•  Familiarity with Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, or similar KDP research tools

•  Experience with BookFunnel or NetGalley for ARC distribution

•  Active presence in or familiarity with BookTok, Bookstagram, Goodreads, or genre-specific online reading communities

•  Experience supporting self-published authors specifically (not just Amazon FBA or retail sellers — the workflows are different)

•  Genuine interest in books and publishing across multiple genres — you read, you follow the industry, and you find the business of books interesting







What This Role Is Not

Being clear about this upfront saves everyone time.



•  You will not be writing copy, making editorial decisions, or creating content. All outreach messages, listing copy, and response drafts are written and approved by the author before you send or post anything.

•  You will not be making strategic decisions about pricing, categories, or advertising spend. You will execute decisions that have already been made and flag situations where a decision is needed.

•  You will not be managing social media accounts. Monitoring for mentions and logging them is part of the role; creating or posting content is not.

•  You will not need to purchase anything or access payment systems. Physical copy shipping (if needed) is handled separately.







Weekly Deliverables

Every week, the author expects the following with no chasing required:



•  Monday morning: Weekly review summary (new reviews across all platforms, star rating update, any flagged items)

•  Monday morning: ARC outreach tracker update (new contacts added, responses received, copies sent)

•  Friday afternoon: BSR and ranking log update for all active titles

•  As needed: Same-day flagging of anything urgent — a review that needs attention, a listing issue, an influencer response requiring follow-up



A note on communication style:



Weekly updates should be brief and scannable — bullet points, not paragraphs. If something needs the author’s decision or attention, say so directly in the first line. If everything is on track, say that clearly too. The author doesn’t want to read between the lines to figure out the status of their business.



Hours and Compensation

This role starts at 10–15 hours per week during the launch phase, with a higher concentration of hours in launch weeks (up to 20 hours during a book’s first two weeks on sale). Phase Two transitions to a more consistent 8–12 hours per week.



Growth Path

This role is designed to grow with the catalog. Hill Country Publishing LLC plans to publish multiple titles per year across a range of genres and audiences. A VA who executes Phase One well and demonstrates good judgment becomes the natural person to own the research and launch infrastructure for every title that follows — regardless of genre or pen name.

Longer-term, this could include coordinating with cover designers and formatters, managing a small ARC reader community, running Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns (training provided), and eventually leading the launch process for new titles with minimal author oversight. That growth depends entirely on demonstrated reliability in the foundational work first.







How to Apply

Please respond with the following. Applications that don’t include all four elements will not be reviewed — this is itself a test of whether you read and follow instructions carefully.



•  1. KDP experience summary: Describe specifically what you’ve done on Amazon KDP. What types of books, what tasks, how many titles, for how long. Generic "I have Amazon experience" does not qualify.

•  2. ARC or outreach example: Describe a specific outreach or review campaign you’ve managed. What was the book or product, how many contacts did you reach, what was the response rate, and how did you track it?

•  3. Tracker sample: Share a link to or screenshot of a spreadsheet you’ve built to manage a similar workflow. It doesn’t need to be KDP-specific — it needs to show that you build organized, functional tracking systems.

•  4. Availability and rate: Your weekly availability in hours, your timezone, your rate, and which platform you prefer to work through.



One more thing:

Start your application with the phrase “Ready to launch.” If you don’t, your application will not be reviewed. This confirms you read the full job description before applying.



Questions about the role can be asked before applying. We typically respond within 48 hours. Interviews are conducted via video call and are approximately 30 minutes. Successful candidates start with a paid two-week trial period before a longer-term agreement is confirmed.

We Management OPC, under Project Swim, is seeking enthusiastic and confident individuals to join our team as Swimming Tutors. This role is open to both full-time and part-time candidates who have a passion for swimming and enjoy working with people of all skill levels. Whether you prefer a fixed schedule (8 AM - 5 PM) or a flexible schedule with a minimum of 4 hours per day, we offer opportunities that fit your availability. Preferred Qualifications:

-Educational background in BSED (Bachelor of Secondary Education) or related fields is a plus.



-Previous experience in coaching, teaching, or working with any individual.



Benefits:

-Opportunity for professional growth and development through training and certification programs.



-Flexible work hours that accommodate your schedule.



-Dynamic work environment, engaging with clients in various locations around Pangasinan.



If you have a passion for swimming and are eager to inspire others while developing your own skills, we encourage you to apply and become part of our growing team! Praying things will go well and God bless!

title: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner
description:
Job Requisition: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner

Position: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner (US Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: 40 hours per week, Monday – Friday. Must be available to work within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Pacific Standard Time (PST), which is 12:00 AM (Midnight) – 10:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT).



Compensation: 40,000 – 55,000 PHP / month (Depending on experience)



We are a premier Virtual Assistant and AI agency dedicated to pairing world-class talent with top-performing businesses. We believe in empowering our tea
mbers, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and delivering unmatched operational excellence to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an elite Virtual Operations Partner to own the operational movement of our clients' real estate businesses. Your core objective is to create predictable, scalable operations by managing transaction coordination, listing management, marketing execution, and CRM integrity. You will ensure that no contingency expires unnoticed, no deadline is missed, and the agent’s time is concentrated on revenue-generating activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Transaction & Listing Control

Contract-to-Close Management: Track timelines, monitor contingencies, coordinate inspections/appraisals, and communicate with escrow to ensure seamless closings.

Listing Management: Execute pre-listing checklists, schedule photographers, coordinate staging, ensure MLS data accuracy, and set up showing instructions. Listings must be launched organized and correctly positioned.

Buyer Workflow: Coordinate offer preparation, organize disclosure packets, set up timeline calendars, and track closing checklists.



Marketing & Database Management

Marketing Execution: Support digital presence via Canva graphic design, social media scheduling, SEO/SEM strategies,
 campaign deployment, and open house material preparation. Brand presentation must remain consistent and error-free.

CRM Integrity: Maintain contact entry accuracy, segment databases, log transactions, create follow-up tasks, and generate pipeline reports.



Communication: Ensure all written communication is clear, structured, and timely. Proactively update clients and vendors on current status, required actions, and timeline impacts.

Daily Operational Rhythm



Start of Day: Review all active transactions, confirm deadlines within 7 days, and identify risk points.

Midday: Follow up on inspections, escrow, and lenders; update the CRM; and confirm vendor timelines.

End of Day: Document transaction progress, prepare next-day priorities, and flag any compliance or risk items.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant, Transaction Coordinator, or Operations Manager, with a mandatory focus on the US Real Estate industry.

Language: Exceptional, highly proficient English skills. Ability to write persuasive, error-free copy and professional transaction updates for an American audience.



Technical Skills: Proven expertise in real estate CRMs, MLS platforms, and transaction management software. Strong proficiency in Canva and foundational SEO/SEM.

Systemization: Ability to build and maintain listing checklist templates, buyer workflows, vendor contact lists, and compliance tracking forms.



Work-From-Home Infrastructure Requirements

Audio Equipment: A high-quality, professional-grade noise-canceling headset is mandatory.

Internet: Access to fast, reliable fiber-optic internet (minimum 50 Mbps) AND a reliable backup internet source.

Power: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or backup generator to ensure zero downtime.

Environment: A dedicated, quiet workspace free from household distractions.

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant (ServiceM8 & Trade Administration)
description:
About Us

We are a premium landscaping and property maintenance company based in Bayside, Melbourne, Australia. We cater to high-end residential clients and top-tier Real Estate agencies. We are currently scaling our operations, and we are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to take the wheel.



The Role

We don’t need someone to just answer
s; we need an operational partner. You will be managing our "Engine Room" - building accurate quotes, coordinating with property managers, and ensuring our field team has exactly what they need on-site. You will start at 15–20 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into a full-time operations role as the business scales.





Your Daily & Weekly Tasks

- Quoting & Invoicing (ServiceM8): Building professional, highly accurate quotes using our established material "bundles" and recipes.

- Data Management (QuickBooks Online): Updating material costs and ensuring supplier invoices are correctly categorized.

- Scheduling & Logistics: Dispatching jobs to the field team, coordinating skip bin deliveries, and managing sub-contractor calendars.

- Inbox Management: Handling client inquiries and filtering the noise so the CEO can focus on site work.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Extreme Attention to Detail: A misplaced decimal point on a paving quote costs us money. You must be meticulous with numbers.

- Flawless English (C1/C2 Level): You will be communicating directly with high-net-worth clients and professional property managers.

- Tech Savvy: Previous experience with ServiceM8, Tradify, Xero, or QuickBooks Online is a massive advantage.

- Timezone Overlap: You must be available to work at least 3 hours per day during Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST) morning hours.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We move fast and value attention to detail above all else. If you do not follow these instructions, your application will be immediately deleted.





To apply, please reply to this posting and change the subject line to read exactly: Bayside Premium Admin - Joe Collins-Graham.



In your message, please include:



A 2–3 sentence summary of your experience with trade software (like ServiceM8) or quoting/estimating.



Confirmation that you are comfortable starting on a part-time basis (15–20 hours/week).

title: Website Copywriter For A Marketing Agency
description:
**Job Title:** Copywriter

**Company:** Grove London

**Location:** Remote / Hybrid

**Job Type:** Full-Time



## About Grove London



Grove London is a full-service marketing agency working across influencer marketing, talent management, celebrity partnerships and bookings, paid ads campaigns, affiliate marketing support for brands, and Airbnb management. We work with both exclusive and non-exclusive creators, allowing us to move quickly, offer flexible solutions, and execute client partnerships efficiently.



With a growing team of over 30 professionals, Grove London supports brands, talent, and partners through creative strategy, strong industry relationships, and fast-moving campaign execution.



## Job Overview



Grove London is seeking a talented, commercially aware, and detail-oriented Copywriter to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who can write clear, persuasive, and polished copy across multiple services while understanding how strong messaging supports conversions, builds trust, and improves the user experience.



The successful candidate will play an important role in shaping how Grove London is presented across its website, service pages, outreach materials, sales decks, campaign materials, and brand communications. This is not just a writing role. We are looking for someone who understands how to frame messaging in a way that helps website visitors and potential clients quickly understand our services and take action.



## Key Responsibilities



* Write and refine high-quality copy for the Grove London website

* Develop clear and persuasive messaging for service pages across influencer marketing, talent management, celebrity partnerships and bookings, paid ads campaigns, affiliate marketing support, and Airbnb management

* Structure website copy for strong conversion and easy user navigation

* Write homepage copy, landing pages, about pages, calls to action, and lead-generation content

* Support the agency with copy for pitch decks, proposals, outreach
s, presentations, and branded materials

* Create compelling copy that communicates the value of our exclusive and non-exclusive creator network

* Help position Grove London as a premium, flexible, fast-moving, and results-driven agency

* Edit and improve existing content to strengthen clarity, professionalism, and commercial impact

* Work closely with internal teams including account managers, campaign managers, designers, and leadership

* Maintain a strong and consistent brand voice across all company touchpoints

* Research audience behavior, competitor positioning, and industry trends to improve messaging performance

* Simplify complex services into clear, attractive, and conversion-focused language



## What the Copywriter Will Be Working On



* Website copy

* Service page content

* Landing pages

* Agency profile wording

* Brand messaging

* Outreach
s

* Sales materials

* Client pitch decks

* Campaign copy

* Paid ad messaging

* Affiliate campaign support copy

* Talent-facing communication

* Case studies

* Calls to action

* SEO-friendly website content

* Airbnb listing and booking-focused descriptions

* Marketing and promotional materials



## Requirements



* Proven experience as a copywriter, content writer, or similar writing role within a marketing, media, creative, or digital agency environment

* Excellent English writing, editing, and proofreading skills

* Strong understanding of persuasive writing and conversion-focused messaging

* Ability to adapt tone of voice for different audiences, industries, and services

* Understanding of website structure, user journey, and how copy impacts conversions

* Ability to write both creatively and strategically

* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects at once

* Ability to work effectively within a larger team environment

* Good understanding of branding, marketing, and digital communications

* Experience in influencer marketing, talent management, paid media, affiliate marketing, or agency work is highly desirable



## Preferred Skills



* Experience writing for service-based businesses

* Familiarity with SEO copywriting principles

* Ability to write premium, brand-led, and direct-response copy

* Strong research skills

* Understanding of consumer behavior and sales psychology

* Confidence in developing messaging that supports both brands and creators



## What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who can help Grove London communicate its value clearly and professionally. The right person should be able to write in a way that makes our business feel:



* Trusted

* Professional

* Premium

* Easy to understand

* High-converting

* Flexible

* Well-connected

* Results-driven



## Why Join Grove London



* Join a fast-growing agency with over 30 tea
mbers

* Work across exciting areas including influencer marketing, celebrity partnerships, and talent management

* Be part of a flexible and fast-moving team

* Help shape the public voice and positioning of a modern global agency

* Contribute directly to how the company wins clients and grows its presence



## How to Apply



Please send your CV, portfolio, and any relevant writing samples that show your ability to write website copy, marketing content, and conversion-focused messaging.



If applying, candidates should ideally include examples of:



* Website copy

* Landing pages

* Sales or pitch materials

* Brand messaging

* Service-based marketing copy

title: Warm Lead Caller – Structured Role | US Hours + Weekend Coverage | Base + Commission
description:
Some roles are unpredictable.

This one isn’t.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’ve built a simple system:



A lead comes in ? you call ? you qualify ? you confirm ? they show up.



That’s the job.



Every person you speak to has already shown interest. They’re not random. They’re not cold. They’re expecting a follow-up.



Your role is to stay on top of the process and make sure nothing breaks.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Calling new leads as soon as they come in

Booking leads who haven’t scheduled yet

Confirming appointments and setting expectations

Calling again ~1 hour before the call

Keeping CRM updates clean and accurate

Staying consistent during US hours + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

A clear, repeatable workflow

Warm, inbound leads only

A role where consistency is actually rewarded



Who This Role Is For:

You speak clear, confident English

You’ve done calling, support, or appointment setting before

You’re comfortable working US time zones

You can reliably cover weekends

You don’t need constant direction — you follow systems well

You take pride in doing things properly, every time



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 minutes):



Your experience with calling or customer-facing roles

Your availability for US hours + weekends

How you usually handle follow-ups and confirmations



We’re hiring one person to run this process.

If you want a role where things are clear, consistent, and under control — apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

title: Experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant – Amazon Expertise (Day/Night Shifts)
description:
We are a multi-million-dollar e-commerce company in the USA.



We are looking for an experienced bookkeeper who is not afraid to learn new things daily, for our E-commerce business. This is a high-growth position. You must be a self-starter and love to learn new things!



As a bookkeeper, the ideal candidate is highly driven, enjoys working with numbers, is detail-oriented, and is familiar with Amazon Seller Central and other online marketplaces. This individual will be the primary point of contact for our bookkeeping. The candidate should be experienced and know how to set up QuickBooks. The ideal candidate must have previously successfully delivered P&L reports to the accountant. You may also be required to learn other e-commerce-related skills to fit in with our existing operations. You must be a leader, reliable, communicative, and willing to learn.

 let us know the following answers:

NOTE: Failure to follow the exact instructions in your responses will immediately disqualify you. You will NOT be considered if you do not follow the instructions and send back your reply listed herein.

-Reconciliation

-Entering bills

-Paying bills

-Expenses

-Credit card usage

-Bank statements

-Balancing checks

-Amazon reports

-Profit and Loss reports

-Monthly balance sheet

-Making sure all finances are up to date

-Setting up and entering everything into QuickBooks

When applying for the position, please include QuickBooks in the title.



This position is full-time. However, initial training may be part-time only to get new hires up to speed.
